4.longDescription: Healing Pathogen grants 10 Physical Armor to targets while active on them. Detonating Bio-Kill Switch increases this bonus to 50 for 2.5 seconds.

4.name: Vigorous Reuptake
4.description: Bio-Kill Switch heals for 30% more when detonating 3 or more Healing Pathogens.
4.longDescription: Bio-Kill Switch heals for 30% more when detonating 3 or more Healing Pathogens.

7.name: The Long Pitch
7.description: Increase the range of Weighted Pustule by 50%. Detonating 2 or more Weighted Pustules causes Stukov's Bio-Kill Switch and Basic Ability cooldowns to recharge 100% faster for 4 seconds.
7.longDescription: Increase the range of Weighted Pustule by 50%. Detonating 2 or more Weighted Pustules causes Stukov's Bio-Kill Switch and Basic Ability cooldowns to recharge 100% faster for 4 seconds.

7.name: Growing Infestation
7.description: Lurking Arm's area expands by 50% over 2.5 seconds, but it cannot be Channeled for longer than 3 seconds.
7.longDescription: Lurking Arm's area expands by 50% over 2.5 seconds, but it cannot be Channeled for longer than 3 seconds.

7.name: Targeted Excision
7.description: Detonating exactly 1 Weighted Pustule (but any number of Healing Pathogens) with Bio-Kill Switch reduces the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch to 7 seconds and other Basic Abilities by 1.5 seconds.
7.longDescription: Detonating exactly 1 Weighted Pustule (but any number of Healing Pathogens) with Bio-Kill Switch reduces the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch to 7 seconds and other Basic Abilities by 1.5 seconds.

10.name: Flailing Swipe
10.description: Swipe 3 times in front of Stukov over 1.75 seconds, dealing 48 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. Each swipe is larger than the previous.
10.longDescription: Swipe 3 times in front of Stukov over 1.75 seconds, dealing 48 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. Each swipe is larger than the previous.

10.name: Massive Shove
10.description: Extend Stukov's arm. If it hits an enemy Hero, they are rapidly shoved until they collide with terrain, dealing 190 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. Stukov gains 50 Armor while shoving an enemy.
10.longDescription: Extend Stukov's arm. If it hits an enemy Hero, they are rapidly shoved until they collide with terrain, dealing 190 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. Stukov gains 50 Armor while shoving an enemy.

13.name: It Hungers
13.description: Increase the range of Lurking Arm by 30%. If Lurking Arm damages enemy Heroes 8 times, its cooldown is reset and its Mana cost is refunded.
13.longDescription: Increase the range of Lurking Arm by 30%. If Lurking Arm damages enemy Heroes 8 times, its cooldown is reset and its Mana cost is refunded.

13.name: Virulent Reaction
13.description: Detonating a Weighted Pustule on an enemy who is inside of Lurking Arm Roots them for 1.5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Detonating a Weighted Pustule on an enemy who is inside of Lurking Arm Roots them for 1.5 seconds.

13.name: Poppin' Pustules
13.description: Detonating Weighted Pustule with Bio-Kill Switch within 1.5 seconds of its expiration increases its damage by 150% and applies its damage and Slow in an area. Enemy Heroes hit have a Weighted Pustule applied to them.
13.longDescription: Detonating Weighted Pustule with Bio-Kill Switch within 1.5 seconds of its expiration increases its damage by 150% and applies its damage and Slow in an area. Enemy Heroes hit have a Weighted Pustule applied to them.

16.name: Superstrain
16.description: Whenever an ally with Healing Pathogen is Stunned or Rooted, they are instantly healed for 300 (+4% per level) Health.
16.longDescription: Whenever an ally with Healing Pathogen is Stunned or Rooted, they are instantly healed for 300 (+4% per level) Health.

16.name: Universal Carrier
16.description: Healing Pathogen can continually spread through Stukov, but its healing is reduced by 25%.
16.longDescription: Healing Pathogen can continually spread through Stukov, but its healing is reduced by 25%.

16.name: Pox Populi
16.description: Bio-Kill Switch no longer removes Healing Pathogen but instead sets its duration to 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Bio-Kill Switch no longer removes Healing Pathogen but instead sets its duration to 3 seconds.

20.name: Controlled Chaos
20.description: Flailing Swipe gains 2 additional charges, but each use only swings 1 time, at maximum range. Additionally, its cooldown is decreased to 25 seconds, and its Mana cost is reduced from 60 to 25.
20.longDescription: Flailing Swipe gains 2 additional charges, but each use only swings 1 time, at maximum range. Additionally, its cooldown is decreased to 25 seconds, and its Mana cost is reduced from 60 to 25.

20.name: Push Comes To Shove
20.description: Massive Shove Slows its target by 50% for 4 seconds upon colliding with terrain. If Massive Shove pushes a target for more than 1.25 seconds, its cooldown is reduced by 15 seconds.
20.longDescription: Massive Shove Slows its target by 50% for 4 seconds upon colliding with terrain. If Massive Shove pushes a target for more than 1.25 seconds, its cooldown is reduced by 15 seconds.

20.name: Top Off
20.description: Healing Pathogen's heal over time is increased by 30% while its target is above 60% Health.
20.longDescription: Healing Pathogen's heal over time is increased by 30% while its target is above 60% Health.

20.name: Bio-Explosion Switch
20.description: Bio-Kill Switch now also detonates Lurking Arm, dealing 230 (+4% per level) damage, applying a Weighted Pustule, and Silencing enemy Heroes inside for 2.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Bio-Kill Switch now also detonates Lurking Arm, dealing 230 (+4% per level) damage, applying a Weighted Pustule, and Silencing enemy Heroes inside for 2.5 seconds.

1.name: Convection
1.description: Repeatable Quest: Hit 20 enemy Heroes with Flamestrike without dying.  Repeatable Reward: Permanently increases Flamestrike damage by 200, and Kael'thas's maximum Health by 100.
1.longDescription: Repeatable Quest: Hit 20 enemy Heroes with Flamestrike without dying.  Repeatable Reward: Permanently increases Flamestrike damage by 200, and Kael'thas's maximum Health by 100.

1.name: Fel Infusion
1.description: Increases Kael'thas's Spell Power by 4%. Kael'thas heals for 94 (+4% per level) Health when activating Verdant Spheres.
1.longDescription: Increases Kael'thas's Spell Power by 4%. Kael'thas heals for 94 (+4% per level) Health when activating Verdant Spheres.

1.name: Mana Addict
1.description: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Kael'thas's maximum Mana by 15.  Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, Kael'thas can activate Arcane Barrier to gain a Shield equal to 100% of his maximum Mana for 4 seconds. 45 second cooldown.
1.longDescription: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Kael'thas's maximum Mana by 15.  Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, Kael'thas can activate Arcane Barrier to gain a Shield equal to 100% of his maximum Mana for 4 seconds. 45 second cooldown.

4.name: Nether Wind
4.description: Increases Gravity Lapse's range by 30%. When Gravity Lapse hits an enemy Hero, refund 80 Mana.
4.longDescription: Increases Gravity Lapse's range by 30%. When Gravity Lapse hits an enemy Hero, refund 80 Mana.

4.name: Energy Roil
4.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Gravity Lapse by 70. If Gravity Lapse hits a Hero, reduce its cooldown by 8 seconds.
4.longDescription: Reduce the Mana cost of Gravity Lapse by 70. If Gravity Lapse hits a Hero, reduce its cooldown by 8 seconds.

4.name: Mana Tap
4.description: Activating Verdant Spheres restores 5% of Kael'thas's maximum Mana.
4.longDescription: Activating Verdant Spheres restores 5% of Kael'thas's maximum Mana.

7.name: Burned Flesh
7.description: When Flamestrike damages 2 or more Heroes, they take additional damage equal to 8% of their maximum Health.
7.longDescription: When Flamestrike damages 2 or more Heroes, they take additional damage equal to 8% of their maximum Health.

7.name: Sun King's Fury
7.description: Living Bombs that have spread to enemy Heroes deal 35% more damage.
7.longDescription: Living Bombs that have spread to enemy Heroes deal 35% more damage.

7.name: Sunfire Enchantment
7.description: Activating Verdant Spheres causes Kael'thas's next 2 Basic Attacks to instead deal 115 (+4% per level) Spell Damage. If both of these Attacks hit enemy Heroes, gain 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
7.longDescription: Activating Verdant Spheres causes Kael'thas's next 2 Basic Attacks to instead deal 115 (+4% per level) Spell Damage. If both of these Attacks hit enemy Heroes, gain 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.

10.name: Phoenix
10.description: Launch a Phoenix to an area, dealing 84 (+4% per level) damage to enemies along the way. The Phoenix persists for 7 seconds, attacking enemies for 84 (+4% per level) damage and splashing for 42 (+4% per level) damage.
10.longDescription: Launch a Phoenix to an area, dealing 84 (+4% per level) damage to enemies along the way. The Phoenix persists for 7 seconds, attacking enemies for 84 (+4% per level) damage and splashing for 42 (+4% per level) damage.

10.name: Pyroblast
10.description: After 1.5 seconds, cast a slow-moving fireball that deals 810 (+5% per level) damage to an enemy Hero and 405 (+5% per level) damage to enemies nearby.
10.longDescription: After 1.5 seconds, cast a slow-moving fireball that deals 810 (+5% per level) damage to an enemy Hero and 405 (+5% per level) damage to enemies nearby.

13.name: Pyromaniac
13.description: Each time Living Bomb deals periodic damage, Kael'thas's Basic Ability cooldowns are reduced by 0.5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Each time Living Bomb deals periodic damage, Kael'thas's Basic Ability cooldowns are reduced by 0.5 seconds.

13.name: Backdraft
13.description: Living Bomb's explosion slows enemy Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.
13.longDescription: Living Bomb's explosion slows enemy Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.

13.name: Fission Bomb
13.description: Increases Living Bomb's explosion radius by 20%.
13.longDescription: Increases Living Bomb's explosion radius by 20%.

16.name: Fury of the Sunwell
16.description: Flamestrike will explode a second time 1.5 seconds later.
16.longDescription: Flamestrike will explode a second time 1.5 seconds later.

16.name: Ignite
16.description: Flamestrikes apply Living Bomb to the enemy Hero closest to its center who is not currently affected by Living Bomb.
16.longDescription: Flamestrikes apply Living Bomb to the enemy Hero closest to its center who is not currently affected by Living Bomb.

16.name: Twin Spheres
16.description: Verdant Spheres gains a second charge.  Passive: Kael'thas benefits from all of his level 7 talents.
16.longDescription: Verdant Spheres gains a second charge.  Passive: Kael'thas benefits from all of his level 7 talents.

20.name: Rebirth
20.description: Increases Phoenix duration by 100%. While alive, the Phoenix may be ordered to move to a different location. Stores 3 charges.
20.longDescription: Increases Phoenix duration by 100%. While alive, the Phoenix may be ordered to move to a different location. Stores 3 charges.

20.name: Presence Of Mind
20.description: Increases Pyroblast's explosion radius by 50%. Heroes that are hit by Flamestrike or have Living Bomb spread to them reduce the cooldown of Pyroblast by 10 seconds.
20.longDescription: Increases Pyroblast's explosion radius by 50%. Heroes that are hit by Flamestrike or have Living Bomb spread to them reduce the cooldown of Pyroblast by 10 seconds.

20.name: Master of Flames
20.description: Living Bomb's spread from explosions can now also spread Living Bomb.
20.longDescription: Living Bomb's spread from explosions can now also spread Living Bomb.

20.name: Flamethrower
20.description: Increases the cast range of Flamestrike by 40%. If Flamestrike hits 2 or more Heroes, its cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds.
20.longDescription: Increases the cast range of Flamestrike by 40%. If Flamestrike hits 2 or more Heroes, its cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds.

1.name: Winds of Celerity
1.description: Increases Raven Form's Movement Speed bonus by 50%.
1.longDescription: Increases Raven Form's Movement Speed bonus by 50%.

1.name: Raven's Intellect
1.description: Raven Form increases Medivh's Mana and Health Regeneration by 75%.
1.longDescription: Raven Form increases Medivh's Mana and Health Regeneration by 75%.

1.name: Portal Mastery
1.description: Medivh can manually place both Portal locations and it no longer breaks Raven Form.  Activate Medivh's Trait to cancel an unlinked Portal.
1.longDescription: Medivh can manually place both Portal locations and it no longer breaks Raven Form.  Activate Medivh's Trait to cancel an unlinked Portal.

4.name: Mage Armor
4.description: The first time an ally uses a Portal, they gain 40 Armor for 5 seconds, reducing their damage taken by 40%.
4.longDescription: The first time an ally uses a Portal, they gain 40 Armor for 5 seconds, reducing their damage taken by 40%.

4.name: Raven Familiar
4.description: A Raven Familiar joins allies each time they use a Portal. The Raven will dive at the ally's next Basic Attack against a Hero within 5 seconds, dealing 114 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing them by 30% for 2.5 seconds.
4.longDescription: A Raven Familiar joins allies each time they use a Portal. The Raven will dive at the ally's next Basic Attack against a Hero within 5 seconds, dealing 114 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing them by 30% for 2.5 seconds.

4.name: Dust of Appearance
4.description: Activate to greatly increase sight range for 5 seconds and reveal enemy Heroes in the area for 8 seconds. Does not cancel Raven Form.  Passive: Increase Medivh's sight range while in Raven Form by 25%.
4.longDescription: Activate to greatly increase sight range for 5 seconds and reveal enemy Heroes in the area for 8 seconds. Does not cancel Raven Form.  Passive: Increase Medivh's sight range while in Raven Form by 25%.

7.name: Mystic Assault
7.description: If Arcane Rift hits an enemy Hero, Medivh's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 50% more damage and heals for 50% of the damage dealt.
7.longDescription: If Arcane Rift hits an enemy Hero, Medivh's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 50% more damage and heals for 50% of the damage dealt.

7.name: Arcane Explosion
7.description: When Force of Will expires, it deals 80 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies, plus 50% of the damage it prevented, up to 315 (+4% per level) additional damage.
7.longDescription: When Force of Will expires, it deals 80 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies, plus 50% of the damage it prevented, up to 315 (+4% per level) additional damage.

7.name: Force of Magic
7.description: Preventing at least 268 (+4% per level) damage with a single cast of Force of Will grants 30% Spell Power for 15 seconds. Stacks up to 2 times.
7.longDescription: Preventing at least 268 (+4% per level) damage with a single cast of Force of Will grants 30% Spell Power for 15 seconds. Stacks up to 2 times.

10.name: Poly Bomb
10.description: Polymorph an enemy Hero for 2 seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.
10.longDescription: Polymorph an enemy Hero for 2 seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.

10.name: Ley Line Seal
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, unleash a wave of energy that places enemy Heroes in Time Stop for 3 seconds.
10.longDescription: After 0.5 seconds, unleash a wave of energy that places enemy Heroes in Time Stop for 3 seconds.

13.name: Circle of Protection
13.description: Force of Will also applies to allies near the target, but its cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.
13.longDescription: Force of Will also applies to allies near the target, but its cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.

13.name: Enduring Will
13.description: Preventing at least 268 (+4% per level) damage with Force of Will reduces its cooldown to 4 seconds.
13.longDescription: Preventing at least 268 (+4% per level) damage with Force of Will reduces its cooldown to 4 seconds.

13.name: Reabsorption
13.description: Increase the amount of healing from Force of Will to 70% of the damage it absorbed.
13.longDescription: Increase the amount of healing from Force of Will to 70% of the damage it absorbed.

16.name: Arcane Charge
16.description: When Arcane Rift damages an enemy Hero, the next Arcane Rift deals 15% more damage.
16.longDescription: When Arcane Rift damages an enemy Hero, the next Arcane Rift deals 15% more damage.

16.name: Temporal Flux
16.description: Basic Attacks reduce Medivh's Heroic Ability cooldown by 3%. Each enemy Hero hit by Arcane Rift reduces Medivh's Heroic Ability cooldown by 9%.
16.longDescription: Basic Attacks reduce Medivh's Heroic Ability cooldown by 3%. Each enemy Hero hit by Arcane Rift reduces Medivh's Heroic Ability cooldown by 9%.

16.name: Stable Portal
16.description: Decrease Portal cooldown by 25% and increase Portal duration by 50%.
16.longDescription: Decrease Portal cooldown by 25% and increase Portal duration by 50%.

20.name: Glyph Of Poly Bomb
20.description: Poly Bomb now hits an area, instantly Polymorphing enemy Heroes, hitting the same area again 1 second later.  Poly Bomb's duration is reduced to 1 second, and the spread radius is increased by 25%.
20.longDescription: Poly Bomb now hits an area, instantly Polymorphing enemy Heroes, hitting the same area again 1 second later.  Poly Bomb's duration is reduced to 1 second, and the spread radius is increased by 25%.

20.name: Medivh Cheats!
20.description: Increase the duration of the Time Stop by 33% and gain the ability to redirect the wave once while it's active.
20.longDescription: Increase the duration of the Time Stop by 33% and gain the ability to redirect the wave once while it's active.

20.name: Guardian of Tirisfal
20.description: Minions and Catapults hit by Arcane Rift are instantly killed.
20.longDescription: Minions and Catapults hit by Arcane Rift are instantly killed.

20.name: Arcane Brilliance
20.description: Activate to instantly restore 200 mana to all nearby allied Heroes and grant them 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
20.longDescription: Activate to instantly restore 200 mana to all nearby allied Heroes and grant them 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.

20.name: Dust of Disappearance
20.description: Stealth an allied Hero for 40 seconds, they are Unrevealable for the first 0.5 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.  Stores up to 2 charges.
20.longDescription: Stealth an allied Hero for 40 seconds, they are Unrevealable for the first 0.5 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.  Stores up to 2 charges.

1.name: Pursuit of Flame
1.description: Quest: Hit 30 enemy Heroes with Fel Flame without dying.  Reward: Permanently increase Fel Flame's area by 33%.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hit 30 enemy Heroes with Fel Flame without dying.  Reward: Permanently increase Fel Flame's area by 33%.

1.name: Chaotic Energy
1.description: Increases the cast range of Drain Life by 25%, and Regen Globes heal for 50% more.  Quest: Gather 15 Regen Globes.  Reward: Basic Ability Mana costs are permanently reduced by 20.
1.longDescription: Increases the cast range of Drain Life by 25%, and Regen Globes heal for 50% more.  Quest: Gather 15 Regen Globes.  Reward: Basic Ability Mana costs are permanently reduced by 20.

1.name: Echoed Corruption
1.description: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Corruption.  Reward: After hitting 40 heroes, Corruption gains new functionality. After the third strike, Corruption strikes 3 times in the opposite direction.  Pinnacle Reward: After 85 hits, Corruption heals for 100% of the damage dealt.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Corruption.  Reward: After hitting 40 heroes, Corruption gains new functionality. After the third strike, Corruption strikes 3 times in the opposite direction.  Pinnacle Reward: After 85 hits, Corruption heals for 100% of the damage dealt.

4.name: Health Funnel
4.description: Drain Life's cooldown recharges 100% faster while it is channeling. If an enemy dies while under the effect of Drain Life, the cooldown is instantly refreshed.
4.longDescription: Drain Life's cooldown recharges 100% faster while it is channeling. If an enemy dies while under the effect of Drain Life, the cooldown is instantly refreshed.

4.name: Improved Life Tap
4.description: Increase the Mana restored by Life Tap to 40%.
4.longDescription: Increase the Mana restored by Life Tap to 40%.

4.name: Consume Soul
4.description: Instantly kill an enemy Minion and heal for 365 (+4% per level) Health.  Stores up to 3 charges.
4.longDescription: Instantly kill an enemy Minion and heal for 365 (+4% per level) Health.  Stores up to 3 charges.

7.name: Bound by Shadow
7.description: Each enemy Hero hit with Fel Flame reduces the cooldown of Corruption by 1.75 seconds.
7.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit with Fel Flame reduces the cooldown of Corruption by 1.75 seconds.

7.name: Curse of Exhaustion
7.description: Drain Life deals 50% more damage and Slows the target's Movement Speed by 40%.
7.longDescription: Drain Life deals 50% more damage and Slows the target's Movement Speed by 40%.

7.name: Hunger for Power
7.description: Increases Spell Power by 15% but reduces healing received from allies by 25%.
7.longDescription: Increases Spell Power by 15% but reduces healing received from allies by 25%.

10.name: Horrify
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, deal 120 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes in an area and Fear them for 2 seconds. While Feared, Heroes are Silenced and are forced to run away from Horrify's center.
10.longDescription: After 0.5 seconds, deal 120 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes in an area and Fear them for 2 seconds. While Feared, Heroes are Silenced and are forced to run away from Horrify's center.

10.name: Rain of Destruction
10.description: After 1.5 seconds, summon a rain of meteors in an area for 7 seconds. Each meteor deals 165 (+4% per level) damage in a small area.
10.longDescription: After 1.5 seconds, summon a rain of meteors in an area for 7 seconds. Each meteor deals 165 (+4% per level) damage in a small area.

13.name: Fel Armor
13.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Fel Flame grants 50 Spell Armor for 2.5 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 50%.
13.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Fel Flame grants 50 Spell Armor for 2.5 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 50%.

13.name: Harvest Life
13.description: Drain Life heals for 75% more Health when used on Heroes.
13.longDescription: Drain Life heals for 75% more Health when used on Heroes.

13.name: Dark Bargain
13.description: Gul'dan's maximum Health is permanently increased by 40% but his respawn time is increased by 10 seconds.
13.longDescription: Gul'dan's maximum Health is permanently increased by 40% but his respawn time is increased by 10 seconds.

13.name: Healthstone
13.description: Activate to heal for 25% of Gul'dan's maximum Health.
13.longDescription: Activate to heal for 25% of Gul'dan's maximum Health.

16.name: Rampant Hellfire
16.description: Fel Flame's damage is increased by 12% for 5 seconds when hitting an enemy Hero. This can stack up to 5 times.
16.longDescription: Fel Flame's damage is increased by 12% for 5 seconds when hitting an enemy Hero. This can stack up to 5 times.

16.name: Ruinous Affliction
16.description: Corruption deals an additional 70 (+4% per level) damage on impact. If the enemy is hit by all three strikes, the third strike deals 242 (+4% per level) damage.
16.longDescription: Corruption deals an additional 70 (+4% per level) damage on impact. If the enemy is hit by all three strikes, the third strike deals 242 (+4% per level) damage.

16.name: Darkness Within
16.description: Dealing 600 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes causes the next cast of Life Tap to cost no Health and grant Gul'dan 25% Spell Power for 5 seconds.
16.longDescription: Dealing 600 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes causes the next cast of Life Tap to cost no Health and grant Gul'dan 25% Spell Power for 5 seconds.

20.name: Haunt
20.description: Increases the duration of Horrify by 1 second, and while Feared, enemies lose 20 Armor, causing them to take 20% increased damage.
20.longDescription: Increases the duration of Horrify by 1 second, and while Feared, enemies lose 20 Armor, causing them to take 20% increased damage.

20.name: Deep Impact
20.description: Rain of Destruction Slows enemies Movement Speed by 90% for 0.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Rain of Destruction Slows enemies Movement Speed by 90% for 0.5 seconds.

20.name: Demonic Circle
20.description: Summon a Demonic Circle at Gul'dan's location. Activate to teleport Gul'dan to the Demonic Circle.
20.longDescription: Summon a Demonic Circle at Gul'dan's location. Activate to teleport Gul'dan to the Demonic Circle.

1.name: Tricky Shuffles
1.description: While Frag Launcher has no charges left, Junkrat gains 10% Movement Speed and his Basic Attacks deal 15% bonus damage.
1.longDescription: While Frag Launcher has no charges left, Junkrat gains 10% Movement Speed and his Basic Attacks deal 15% bonus damage.

1.name: Extra-Wound Timers
1.description: The final grenade launched from Frag Launcher deals 100% bonus damage, and Frag Launcher grenades last an additional 2 seconds before automatically detonating.
1.longDescription: The final grenade launched from Frag Launcher deals 100% bonus damage, and Frag Launcher grenades last an additional 2 seconds before automatically detonating.

1.name: Blow 'Em Up!
1.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine or Steel Trap causes Junkrat to deal 25% more damage with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities for 6 seconds.
1.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine or Steel Trap causes Junkrat to deal 25% more damage with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities for 6 seconds.

4.name: Taste For Explosions
4.description: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Frag Launcher increases its damage by 0.2%, up to 40%.
4.longDescription: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Frag Launcher increases its damage by 0.2%, up to 40%.

4.name: BOOM POW
4.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine reduces its cooldown by 10 seconds.
4.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine reduces its cooldown by 10 seconds.

4.name: Chattering Teeth
4.description: Steel Traps will slowly chase nearby enemy Heroes.
4.longDescription: Steel Traps will slowly chase nearby enemy Heroes.

7.name: Bogged Down
7.description: Enemies launched by Concussion Mine are Slowed by 40% for 2.5 seconds upon landing.
7.longDescription: Enemies launched by Concussion Mine are Slowed by 40% for 2.5 seconds upon landing.

7.name: Sticky Wicket
7.description: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Steel Trap are Silenced for 2 seconds.
7.longDescription: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Steel Trap are Silenced for 2 seconds.

7.name: Dirty Trickster
7.description: Increase the explosion radius of Total Mayhem by 20%. When Junkrat is Stunned, Rooted, or damaged by an enemy Hero while below 50% Health, he uses Total Mayhem, dropping 5 grenades at his feet that explode.  This effect has a 20 second cooldown.
7.longDescription: Increase the explosion radius of Total Mayhem by 20%. When Junkrat is Stunned, Rooted, or damaged by an enemy Hero while below 50% Health, he uses Total Mayhem, dropping 5 grenades at his feet that explode.  This effect has a 20 second cooldown.

10.name: RIP-Tire
10.description: Create a motorized bomb with 530 (+4% per level) Health that lasts 15 seconds. While active, Junkrat is immobile but gains control of RIP-Tire's movement.  RIP-Tire can be reactivated to detonate immediately, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing 720 (+4% per level) damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to 445 (+4% per level) to enemies on the edge.
10.longDescription: Create a motorized bomb with 530 (+4% per level) Health that lasts 15 seconds. While active, Junkrat is immobile but gains control of RIP-Tire's movement.  RIP-Tire can be reactivated to detonate immediately, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing 720 (+4% per level) damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to 445 (+4% per level) to enemies on the edge.

10.name: Rocket Ride
10.description: After 1.25 seconds, Junkrat launches into the air. While in the air, he can steer the landing location by moving.  After 3.75 seconds, Junkrat lands, dealing 935 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies and activating Total Mayhem. 5 seconds after landing, Junkrat reappears at the Hall of Storms and gains 150% additional Movement Speed until dismounted.
10.longDescription: After 1.25 seconds, Junkrat launches into the air. While in the air, he can steer the landing location by moving.  After 3.75 seconds, Junkrat lands, dealing 935 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies and activating Total Mayhem. 5 seconds after landing, Junkrat reappears at the Hall of Storms and gains 150% additional Movement Speed until dismounted.

13.name: Bombs Away
13.description: Increase Junkrat's Basic Attack range by 1. Frag Launcher grenades fired within 0.5 seconds of using a Basic Attack deal 30% bonus damage.
13.longDescription: Increase Junkrat's Basic Attack range by 1. Frag Launcher grenades fired within 0.5 seconds of using a Basic Attack deal 30% bonus damage.

13.name: Ripper Air
13.description: Junkrat is knocked back 50% farther by Concussion Mine. Additionally, Concussion Mine's cooldown is reduced by 12 seconds if only Junkrat is hit.
13.longDescription: Junkrat is knocked back 50% farther by Concussion Mine. Additionally, Concussion Mine's cooldown is reduced by 12 seconds if only Junkrat is hit.

13.name: Gotta Trap 'Em All!
13.description: Reduce Steel Trap's cooldown by 5 seconds and increase the maximum number of active traps to 2.
13.longDescription: Reduce Steel Trap's cooldown by 5 seconds and increase the maximum number of active traps to 2.

13.name: Big As
13.description: Steel Trap now only hits Heroes, and Heroes hit have their Armor reduced by 15 for 3 seconds. Increases Steel Trap's radius and damage by 50%.
13.longDescription: Steel Trap now only hits Heroes, and Heroes hit have their Armor reduced by 15 for 3 seconds. Increases Steel Trap's radius and damage by 50%.

16.name: Burst Fire
16.description: Frag Launcher fires all of its charges in a continuous burst, its cooldown is reduced by 6 seconds, but it loses 1 maximum charge.
16.longDescription: Frag Launcher fires all of its charges in a continuous burst, its cooldown is reduced by 6 seconds, but it loses 1 maximum charge.

16.name: Endless Nades
16.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Frag Launcher reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds.
16.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Frag Launcher reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds.

16.name: Spread Volley
16.description: Activate to make Frag Launcher fire 2 additional grenades in a spread. Works for up to 4 total charges, or until Frag Launcher runs out of charges.
16.longDescription: Activate to make Frag Launcher fire 2 additional grenades in a spread. Works for up to 4 total charges, or until Frag Launcher runs out of charges.

20.name: Extra Oomph
20.description: Increase RIP-Tire's knockback distance by 80%, and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds for each enemy Hero hit.
20.longDescription: Increase RIP-Tire's knockback distance by 80%, and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds for each enemy Hero hit.

20.name: Puckish Scamp
20.description: Junkrat also gains the Ability RIP-Tire. Each time he uses his Heroic, it swaps to the alternate ability.  Passive: Reduce both Heroic cooldowns by 20 seconds.
20.longDescription: Junkrat also gains the Ability RIP-Tire. Each time he uses his Heroic, it swaps to the alternate ability.  Passive: Reduce both Heroic cooldowns by 20 seconds.

20.name: Cannonball!
20.description: Increase the radius and explosion radius of grenades from Basic Attacks and Frag Launcher by 50%.
20.longDescription: Increase the radius and explosion radius of grenades from Basic Attacks and Frag Launcher by 50%.

20.name: I Hate Waiting!
20.description: Junkrat always rides his Rocket Ride Mount, which grants 150% increased Movement Speed, but his Mount cooldown is increased to 8 seconds.
20.longDescription: Junkrat always rides his Rocket Ride Mount, which grants 150% increased Movement Speed, but his Mount cooldown is increased to 8 seconds.

1.name: Evenhanded Blessings
1.description: If Flash Heal is cast on a different target from its last, increase its healing by 15% and refund 40% of its cooldown.
1.longDescription: If Flash Heal is cast on a different target from its last, increase its healing by 15% and refund 40% of its cooldown.

1.name: Power Word: Shield
1.description: While Divine Star is traveling out, allies in its path gain a Shield that absorbs 128 (+4% per level) damage for 4 seconds.  If Divine Star hits an enemy Hero, Anduin gains a Shield that absorbs 185 (+4% per level) damage for 4 seconds.
1.longDescription: While Divine Star is traveling out, allies in its path gain a Shield that absorbs 128 (+4% per level) damage for 4 seconds.  If Divine Star hits an enemy Hero, Anduin gains a Shield that absorbs 185 (+4% per level) damage for 4 seconds.

1.name: Lightwell
1.description: Summon a Lightwell that periodically heals a nearby allied Hero for 50 (+4% per level). The well only fades after healing 15 times or when recast.  This cooldown is reduced by 1 second each time Anduin heals an allied Hero.
1.longDescription: Summon a Lightwell that periodically heals a nearby allied Hero for 50 (+4% per level). The well only fades after healing 15 times or when recast.  This cooldown is reduced by 1 second each time Anduin heals an allied Hero.

4.name: Moral Compass
4.description: Divine Star fires Basic Attacks at Heroes close to its apex.  Passive: Increase Attack Range by 1.1.
4.longDescription: Divine Star fires Basic Attacks at Heroes close to its apex.  Passive: Increase Attack Range by 1.1.

4.name: Surge of Light
4.description: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Chastise by 0.75 seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes Rooted by Chastise launch an additional Basic Attack and restore 25 Mana.
4.longDescription: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Chastise by 0.75 seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes Rooted by Chastise launch an additional Basic Attack and restore 25 Mana.

4.name: Piercing Light
4.description: Chastise pierces to hit an additional Hero.  Quest: Hitting two Heroes with a single Chastise permanently increases Spell Power by 1, to a maximum of 10.
4.longDescription: Chastise pierces to hit an additional Hero.  Quest: Hitting two Heroes with a single Chastise permanently increases Spell Power by 1, to a maximum of 10.

7.name: Binding Heal
7.description: Casting Flash Heal on an ally heals Anduin for 135 (+4% per level).
7.longDescription: Casting Flash Heal on an ally heals Anduin for 135 (+4% per level).

7.name: Blessed Recovery
7.description: If Anduin loses more than 8% of his maximum Health at once, recover 15% Health over 3 seconds.  This effect has a 10 second cooldown.  Current Health required: 133 (+4% per level)
7.longDescription: If Anduin loses more than 8% of his maximum Health at once, recover 15% Health over 3 seconds.  This effect has a 10 second cooldown.  Current Health required: 133 (+4% per level)

7.name: Desperate Prayer
7.description: Activate to instantly heal an allied Hero for 375 (+4% per level), but kneel for 2 seconds, unable to act.
7.longDescription: Activate to instantly heal an allied Hero for 375 (+4% per level), but kneel for 2 seconds, unable to act.

10.name: Holy Word: Salvation
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, Channel to invoke the Light for 3 seconds. While nearby, allied Heroes heal for up to 30% of their max Health and are Protected.
10.longDescription: After 0.5 seconds, Channel to invoke the Light for 3 seconds. While nearby, allied Heroes heal for up to 30% of their max Health and are Protected.

10.name: Lightbomb
10.description: Imbue an allied Hero with the Light. After 1.5 seconds, it explodes, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage to enemies and Stunning them for 1.25 seconds.  The target gains a Shield that absorbs 165 (+4% per level) damage per enemy Hero hit. Lasts for 5 seconds.
10.longDescription: Imbue an allied Hero with the Light. After 1.5 seconds, it explodes, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage to enemies and Stunning them for 1.25 seconds.  The target gains a Shield that absorbs 165 (+4% per level) damage per enemy Hero hit. Lasts for 5 seconds.

13.name: Speed of the Pious
13.description: While Divine Star is traveling, gain 30% Movement Speed. Each allied Hero healed by Divine Star on its return to Anduin reduces its cooldown by 1 second.
13.longDescription: While Divine Star is traveling, gain 30% Movement Speed. Each allied Hero healed by Divine Star on its return to Anduin reduces its cooldown by 1 second.

13.name: Push Forward!
13.description: Damaging an enemy Hero increases Movement Speed by 2.5% and the amount healed by Pursued By Grace by 5% for 6 seconds. These effects stack up to 8 times.
13.longDescription: Damaging an enemy Hero increases Movement Speed by 2.5% and the amount healed by Pursued By Grace by 5% for 6 seconds. These effects stack up to 8 times.

13.name: Enchant Boots - Lion's Speed
13.description: Gain 5% Movement Speed. This bonus is quadrupled while Leap of Faith's cooldown is available. Allies pulled by Leap of Faith are healed for 280 (+4% per level) over 4 seconds.
13.longDescription: Gain 5% Movement Speed. This bonus is quadrupled while Leap of Faith's cooldown is available. Allies pulled by Leap of Faith are healed for 280 (+4% per level) over 4 seconds.

16.name: Renew
16.description: Flash Heal heals an additional 180 (+4% per level) over 6 seconds. The duration of this heal is refreshed each time Anduin hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack.
16.longDescription: Flash Heal heals an additional 180 (+4% per level) over 6 seconds. The duration of this heal is refreshed each time Anduin hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack.

16.name: Holy Nova
16.description: After Anduin catches Divine Star, it explodes, healing nearby allied Heroes for 105 (+4% per level) and damaging enemies for 150 (+4% per level).
16.longDescription: After Anduin catches Divine Star, it explodes, healing nearby allied Heroes for 105 (+4% per level) and damaging enemies for 150 (+4% per level).

16.name: Glyph of Faith
16.description: Leap of Faith gains a 2nd charge.
16.longDescription: Leap of Faith gains a 2nd charge.

16.name: Inner Focus
16.description: Activate to reset the cooldown of Flash Heal and its next cast heals for 25% more.  Damaging enemy Heroes reduces this cooldown by 1 second.
16.longDescription: Activate to reset the cooldown of Flash Heal and its next cast heals for 25% more.  Damaging enemy Heroes reduces this cooldown by 1 second.

20.name: Light of Stormwind
20.description: Holy Word: Salvation grants allied Heroes Invulnerability instead of Protected. This does not affect Anduin.  Channeling Holy Word: Salvation for its full duration reduces its cooldown by 60 seconds.
20.longDescription: Holy Word: Salvation grants allied Heroes Invulnerability instead of Protected. This does not affect Anduin.  Channeling Holy Word: Salvation for its full duration reduces its cooldown by 60 seconds.

20.name: Inner Fire
20.description: The target of Light Bomb gains 40% Move Speed and 50 Armor for 3 seconds.
20.longDescription: The target of Light Bomb gains 40% Move Speed and 50 Armor for 3 seconds.

20.name: Censure
20.description: Chastise Stuns for 0.75 seconds and its Root duration is increased by 0.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Chastise Stuns for 0.75 seconds and its Root duration is increased by 0.5 seconds.

20.name: Varian's Legacy
20.description: Basic Attacks burn enemies for 87 (+4% per level) damage over 3 seconds and Anduin heals for 50% of the damage dealt.
20.longDescription: Basic Attacks burn enemies for 87 (+4% per level) damage over 3 seconds and Anduin heals for 50% of the damage dealt.

1.name: Contact Healing
1.description: Hitting Heroes with Biotic Grenade increases its damage and healing by 30% per Hero hit.
1.longDescription: Hitting Heroes with Biotic Grenade increases its damage and healing by 30% per Hero hit.

1.name: Slumber Shells
1.description: Reduce the cooldown of Sleep Dart by 2 seconds. Upon waking, enemy Heroes are Slowed by 25% for 3 seconds.
1.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Sleep Dart by 2 seconds. Upon waking, enemy Heroes are Slowed by 25% for 3 seconds.

1.name: Vampiric Rounds
1.description: Increase Shrike's healing by 15%.  Repeatable Quest: Stack 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by 1%.  Repeatable Quest: Basic Attack a Hero with 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by 0.25%.
1.longDescription: Increase Shrike's healing by 15%.  Repeatable Quest: Stack 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by 1%.  Repeatable Quest: Basic Attack a Hero with 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by 0.25%.

4.name: Biotic Enhancements
4.description: Increase the bonus healing duration of Biotic Grenade by 50% and reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds.
4.longDescription: Increase the bonus healing duration of Biotic Grenade by 50% and reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds.

4.name: Overdose
4.description: Sleep Dart applies 4 Doses. While Aim Down Sights is active, Sleep Dart pierces all enemy Heroes.
4.longDescription: Sleep Dart applies 4 Doses. While Aim Down Sights is active, Sleep Dart pierces all enemy Heroes.

4.name: Debilitating Dart
4.description: Fire a dart which Slows the Movement Speed and reduces the damage dealt by the first enemy Hero it hits by 50% for 4 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, reduce this cooldown by 8 seconds.
4.longDescription: Fire a dart which Slows the Movement Speed and reduces the damage dealt by the first enemy Hero it hits by 50% for 4 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, reduce this cooldown by 8 seconds.

7.name: Anti-Healer
7.description: Increase the area of Biotic Grenade by 25% and the duration of the healing reduction by 0.75 seconds.
7.longDescription: Increase the area of Biotic Grenade by 25% and the duration of the healing reduction by 0.75 seconds.

7.name: Night Terrors
7.description: Gain 25% Movement Speed for 2 seconds for every Hero hit by Sleep Dart. Upon waking, enemy Heroes take 8% of their Maximum Health in damage.
7.longDescription: Gain 25% Movement Speed for 2 seconds for every Hero hit by Sleep Dart. Upon waking, enemy Heroes take 8% of their Maximum Health in damage.

7.name: Mind-Numbing Agent
7.description: Every Dose a Hero has reduces their Spell Power by 10%.
7.longDescription: Every Dose a Hero has reduces their Spell Power by 10%.

10.name: Nano Boost
10.description: Instantly boost an allied Hero, restoring 200 Mana. For the next 8 seconds, they gain 30% Spell Power and their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 150% faster.  Cannot be used on Ana.
10.longDescription: Instantly boost an allied Hero, restoring 200 Mana. For the next 8 seconds, they gain 30% Spell Power and their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 150% faster.  Cannot be used on Ana.

10.name: Eye of Horus
10.description: Assume a sniping position, gaining the ability to fire up to 6 specialized rounds with unlimited range. Rounds pierce allied and enemy Heroes but collide with enemy Structures in their path. Allies are healed for 225 (+4% per level) and enemies are damaged for 135 (+4% per level). Deals 50% less damage to Structures.  Ana is unable to move while Eye of Horus is active.
10.longDescription: Assume a sniping position, gaining the ability to fire up to 6 specialized rounds with unlimited range. Rounds pierce allied and enemy Heroes but collide with enemy Structures in their path. Allies are healed for 225 (+4% per level) and enemies are damaged for 135 (+4% per level). Deals 50% less damage to Structures.  Ana is unable to move while Eye of Horus is active.

13.name: Speed Serum
13.description: Healing Dart grants 25% Movement Speed to affected Heroes for 2 seconds.
13.longDescription: Healing Dart grants 25% Movement Speed to affected Heroes for 2 seconds.

13.name: Purifying Darts
13.description: Healing Dart removes Roots and Slows from the target, and heals for 20% more when doing so.
13.longDescription: Healing Dart removes Roots and Slows from the target, and heals for 20% more when doing so.

13.name: Smelling Salts
13.description: Healing Dart removes Stuns from the target, and grants them 50 Armor for 2 seconds when doing so.
13.longDescription: Healing Dart removes Stuns from the target, and grants them 50 Armor for 2 seconds when doing so.

16.name: Sharpshooter
16.description: Healing Dart's healing is increased by 5% if it heals a Hero, up to 50%. At maximum bonus, further increase its healing by 35%. This bonus is reset if Healing Dart fails to hit a Hero.
16.longDescription: Healing Dart's healing is increased by 5% if it heals a Hero, up to 50%. At maximum bonus, further increase its healing by 35%. This bonus is reset if Healing Dart fails to hit a Hero.

16.name: Concentrated Doses
16.description: Increase Healing Dart's healing by 12% for each Dose active on enemy Heroes.
16.longDescription: Increase Healing Dart's healing by 12% for each Dose active on enemy Heroes.

16.name: Active Reload
16.description: Activate to instantly gain 3 charges of Healing Dart.
16.longDescription: Activate to instantly gain 3 charges of Healing Dart.

20.name: Nano Infusion
20.description: Allies affected by Nano Boost heal for 50% of Spell Damage dealt.
20.longDescription: Allies affected by Nano Boost heal for 50% of Spell Damage dealt.

20.name: Deadeye
20.description: Eye of Horus cooldown reduced to 6 seconds, but it only regains new rounds every 10 seconds. Remaining cooldown is converted to rounds.  For every Hero Eye of Horus hits, increases its damage and healing by 5%. This bonus resets after leaving Eye of Horus or after 4 seconds.
20.longDescription: Eye of Horus cooldown reduced to 6 seconds, but it only regains new rounds every 10 seconds. Remaining cooldown is converted to rounds.  For every Hero Eye of Horus hits, increases its damage and healing by 5%. This bonus resets after leaving Eye of Horus or after 4 seconds.

20.name: Armored Stance
20.description: Increase Shrike's damage by 50%. While Aim Down Sights is active, gain 25 Armor.
20.longDescription: Increase Shrike's damage by 50%. While Aim Down Sights is active, gain 25 Armor.

20.name: Dynamic Optics
20.description: Basic Attacks increase Attack Speed by 10% for 3 seconds, up to 100%. While Aim Down Sights is active, increase your Basic Attack Range by 4.
20.longDescription: Basic Attacks increase Attack Speed by 10% for 3 seconds, up to 100%. While Aim Down Sights is active, increase your Basic Attack Range by 4.

1.name: Invigoration
1.description: If Hamstring hits a Hero, half of the Mana cost is refunded and the cooldown is reduced by 1 second.
1.longDescription: If Hamstring hits a Hero, half of the Mana cost is refunded and the cooldown is reduced by 1 second.

1.name: Chop Meat
1.description: Increases Hamstring damage by 100% to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
1.longDescription: Increases Hamstring damage by 100% to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

1.name: Block
1.description: Every 5 seconds, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Stores up to 2 charges.
1.longDescription: Every 5 seconds, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Stores up to 2 charges.

4.name: Flail Axe
4.description: Increases the length of Hamstring by 40%.
4.longDescription: Increases the length of Hamstring by 40%.

4.name: Cheap Shot
4.description: Hamstring does 100% more damage to targets affected by a Slow, Root, or Stun.
4.longDescription: Hamstring does 100% more damage to targets affected by a Slow, Root, or Stun.

4.name: Unrelenting Pursuit
4.description: Reduces the cooldown of Ruthless Onslaught by 33% upon impact.
4.longDescription: Reduces the cooldown of Ruthless Onslaught by 33% upon impact.

7.name: Insatiable Blade
7.description: While facing a branded enemy, The Butcher's Movement Speed is increased by 25%.
7.longDescription: While facing a branded enemy, The Butcher's Movement Speed is increased by 25%.

7.name: Meat Shield
7.description: When Ruthless Onslaught impacts an enemy Hero, The Butcher gains 50 Spell Armor for 2.5 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 50%.
7.longDescription: When Ruthless Onslaught impacts an enemy Hero, The Butcher gains 50 Spell Armor for 2.5 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 50%.

7.name: Victuals
7.description: Every time a nearby enemy minion dies, The Butcher heals 5% of his maximum health.
7.longDescription: Every time a nearby enemy minion dies, The Butcher heals 5% of his maximum health.

10.name: Furnace Blast
10.description: After a 3 second delay, fire explodes around The Butcher dealing 500 (+4% per level) damage to enemies.  Can be cast while using Ruthless Onslaught.
10.longDescription: After a 3 second delay, fire explodes around The Butcher dealing 500 (+4% per level) damage to enemies.  Can be cast while using Ruthless Onslaught.

10.name: Lamb to the Slaughter
10.description: Throw a hitching post that attaches to the nearest enemy Hero after a 1 second delay. This deals 171 (+4% per level) damage and causes the enemy to be chained to the post and Silenced for 3 seconds.
10.longDescription: Throw a hitching post that attaches to the nearest enemy Hero after a 1 second delay. This deals 171 (+4% per level) damage and causes the enemy to be chained to the post and Silenced for 3 seconds.

13.name: Brutal Strike
13.description: After using Hamstring, The Butcher's next 3 Basic Attacks within 5 seconds deal an additional 15% damage.
13.longDescription: After using Hamstring, The Butcher's next 3 Basic Attacks within 5 seconds deal an additional 15% damage.

13.name: Savage Charge
13.description: Ruthless Onslaught deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 10% of their maximum Health.
13.longDescription: Ruthless Onslaught deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 10% of their maximum Health.

13.name: Cleaver
13.description: Basic Attacks deal 35% of The Butcher's Basic Attack Damage in an area around the target.
13.longDescription: Basic Attacks deal 35% of The Butcher's Basic Attack Damage in an area around the target.

16.name: Crippling Slam
16.description: Hamstring's Slow no longer decays, and its duration is increased by 30%.
16.longDescription: Hamstring's Slow no longer decays, and its duration is increased by 30%.

16.name: Enraged
16.description: While below 50% of his maximum Health, taking damage causes The Butcher to become Enraged for 10 seconds, gaining 40% Attack Speed and 25 Armor, reducing damage taken by 25%.  This effect has a 25 second cooldown.
16.longDescription: While below 50% of his maximum Health, taking damage causes The Butcher to become Enraged for 10 seconds, gaining 40% Attack Speed and 25 Armor, reducing damage taken by 25%.  This effect has a 25 second cooldown.

16.name: Blood Frenzy
16.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant 5% increased Attack and Movement Speed for 3 seconds, up to 25%.
16.longDescription: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant 5% increased Attack and Movement Speed for 3 seconds, up to 25%.

20.name: Fires of Hell
20.description: Furnace Blast explodes a second time 3 seconds after the initial explosion.
20.longDescription: Furnace Blast explodes a second time 3 seconds after the initial explosion.

20.name: Slaughterhouse
20.description: Lamb to the Slaughter now chains all enemy Heroes in range.
20.longDescription: Lamb to the Slaughter now chains all enemy Heroes in range.

20.name: Nexus Blades
20.description: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.
20.longDescription: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.

20.name: Bolt of the Storm
20.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.
20.longDescription: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

1.name: Nerubian Armor
1.description: Increase Harden Carapace's Spell Armor by 25.
1.longDescription: Increase Harden Carapace's Spell Armor by 25.

1.name: Legion of Beetles
1.description: Beetles have 30 Spell Armor. Automatically spawn a Beetle every 12 seconds. Can be toggled on and off.
1.longDescription: Beetles have 30 Spell Armor. Automatically spawn a Beetle every 12 seconds. Can be toggled on and off.

1.name: Regeneration Master
1.description: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases your Health Regeneration by 1 per second, up to 30.  Reward: After gathering 25 Regeneration Globes, you also gain 500 Health.
1.longDescription: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases your Health Regeneration by 1 per second, up to 30.  Reward: After gathering 25 Regeneration Globes, you also gain 500 Health.

4.name: Bed of Barbs
4.description: Create a bed of spikes along Impale's path that Slows enemies by 25% and deals 21 (+4% per level) damage per second. Spikes persist for 3.5 seconds.
4.longDescription: Create a bed of spikes along Impale's path that Slows enemies by 25% and deals 21 (+4% per level) damage per second. Spikes persist for 3.5 seconds.

4.name: Shed Exoskeleton
4.description: Harden Carapace grants 30% increased Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
4.longDescription: Harden Carapace grants 30% increased Movement Speed for 3 seconds.

4.name: Underking
4.description: Increases Burrow Charge range by 20% and damage by 100%.
4.longDescription: Increases Burrow Charge range by 20% and damage by 100%.

7.name: Chitinous Plating
7.description: While Harden Carapace is active, taking damage from enemy Abilities reduces its cooldown by 1 second, up to 3 seconds.
7.longDescription: While Harden Carapace is active, taking damage from enemy Abilities reduces its cooldown by 1 second, up to 3 seconds.

7.name: Subterranean Shield
7.description: Burrow Charge also grants a 400 (+4% per level) point Shield for 5 seconds.
7.longDescription: Burrow Charge also grants a 400 (+4% per level) point Shield for 5 seconds.

7.name: Leeching Scarabs
7.description: Beetles gain 30% bonus attack damage and they heal Anub'arak for 50% of their damage with each attack if he is nearby.
7.longDescription: Beetles gain 30% bonus attack damage and they heal Anub'arak for 50% of their damage with each attack if he is nearby.

10.name: Locust Swarm
10.description: Deal 68 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Each enemy damaged restores 24 (+4% per level) Health. Lasts 6 seconds.
10.longDescription: Deal 68 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Each enemy damaged restores 24 (+4% per level) Health. Lasts 6 seconds.

10.name: Cocoon
10.description: Wraps target enemy Hero in a cocoon, rendering them unable to act or be targeted for 7 seconds. Allies of the Hero can attack the cocoon to break it and free them early.
10.longDescription: Wraps target enemy Hero in a cocoon, rendering them unable to act or be targeted for 7 seconds. Allies of the Hero can attack the cocoon to break it and free them early.

13.name: Urticating Spines
13.description: Casting Harden Carapace will also deal 90 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. Deals double damage against Heroes.
13.longDescription: Casting Harden Carapace will also deal 90 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. Deals double damage against Heroes.

13.name: Burning Beetles
13.description: Deal 21 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Beetles deal 6 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.
13.longDescription: Deal 21 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Beetles deal 6 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.

13.name: Acid-Drenched Mandibles
13.description: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases Anub'arak's Basic Attack damage by 80% for 4 seconds.
13.longDescription: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases Anub'arak's Basic Attack damage by 80% for 4 seconds.

16.name: Epicenter
16.description: Increases Burrow Charge impact area by 60% and lowers the cooldown by 1 second for each Hero hit.
16.longDescription: Increases Burrow Charge impact area by 60% and lowers the cooldown by 1 second for each Hero hit.

16.name: Debilitation
16.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Burrow Charge or Impale have their Spell Power reduced by 50% for 4 seconds.
16.longDescription: Enemy Heroes hit by Burrow Charge or Impale have their Spell Power reduced by 50% for 4 seconds.

16.name: Beetle, Juiced
16.description: Passive: Beetles gain 30% increased health.  Every 4th Basic Attack spawns a Beetle.
16.longDescription: Passive: Beetles gain 30% increased health.  Every 4th Basic Attack spawns a Beetle.

20.name: Hive Master
20.description: Gain a permanent Vampire Locust that attacks a nearby enemy every 3 seconds. The Vampire Locust deals 165 (+4% per level) damage and returns to heal Anub'arak for 80 (+4% per level) health.
20.longDescription: Gain a permanent Vampire Locust that attacks a nearby enemy every 3 seconds. The Vampire Locust deals 165 (+4% per level) damage and returns to heal Anub'arak for 80 (+4% per level) health.

20.name: Cryptweave
20.description: Staying near the Cocoon allows Anub'arak to extend the duration by up to 6 seconds per Cocoon. Upon exiting the Cocoon, enemies take 60 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. This damage is increased by 100% for each second that they were inside.
20.longDescription: Staying near the Cocoon allows Anub'arak to extend the duration by up to 6 seconds per Cocoon. Upon exiting the Cocoon, enemies take 60 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. This damage is increased by 100% for each second that they were inside.

20.name: The Traitor King
20.description: Gain 10% bonus maximum Health and 20 Spell Armor.  Activate to gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds.
20.longDescription: Gain 10% bonus maximum Health and 20 Spell Armor.  Activate to gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds.

20.name: Rewind
20.description: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.
20.longDescription: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.

1.name: Target Practice
1.description: Quest: Hit every enemy Hero with Storm Bow.  Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero once with Storm Bow, its range is increased by 30%.  Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero 3 times with Storm Bow, its damage is increased by 100.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hit every enemy Hero with Storm Bow.  Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero once with Storm Bow, its range is increased by 30%.  Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero 3 times with Storm Bow, its damage is increased by 100.

1.name: Simple Geometry
1.description: Quest: Hit a Hero with multiple arrows from the same Scatter Arrow cast 20 times. Each arrow hit after the second grants additional progress.  Reward: Upon hitting terrain for the first time, Scatter Arrow creates 2 additional arrows.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hit a Hero with multiple arrows from the same Scatter Arrow cast 20 times. Each arrow hit after the second grants additional progress.  Reward: Upon hitting terrain for the first time, Scatter Arrow creates 2 additional arrows.

1.name: Redemption
1.description: Quest: Every 2 Basic Attacks against the same Hero within 10 seconds grants 1 Redemption, stacking up to 12. Dying decreases Redemption by 3, and Redemption can be lost even at maximum stacks.  Reward: At 12 Redemption, gain 50% Attack Speed.
1.longDescription: Quest: Every 2 Basic Attacks against the same Hero within 10 seconds grants 1 Redemption, stacking up to 12. Dying decreases Redemption by 3, and Redemption can be lost even at maximum stacks.  Reward: At 12 Redemption, gain 50% Attack Speed.

4.name: Explosive Arrows
4.description: Upon hitting a Minion or Monster, Storm Bow deals 60% of its damage to enemies around its target.
4.longDescription: Upon hitting a Minion or Monster, Storm Bow deals 60% of its damage to enemies around its target.

4.name: Serrated Arrows
4.description: Scatter Arrow deals 100% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
4.longDescription: Scatter Arrow deals 100% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

4.name: Ignore All Distractions
4.description: Basic Attacks instantly kill Minions and increase Hanzo's Basic Attack range by 2 for 3 seconds.
4.longDescription: Basic Attacks instantly kill Minions and increase Hanzo's Basic Attack range by 2 for 3 seconds.

7.name: The Dragon Hungers
7.description: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants 5% Spell Power for 12 seconds, stacking up to 20%.
7.longDescription: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants 5% Spell Power for 12 seconds, stacking up to 20%.

7.name: Never Outmatched
7.description: Reduce Scatter Arrow's Mana cost from 50 to 30. Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Scatter Arrow by 3 seconds.
7.longDescription: Reduce Scatter Arrow's Mana cost from 50 to 30. Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Scatter Arrow by 3 seconds.

7.name: Sharpened Arrowheads
7.description: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow or Basic Attacks reduces their Armor by 3 for 3 seconds, up to a maximum reduction of 20 Armor.
7.longDescription: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow or Basic Attacks reduces their Armor by 3 for 3 seconds, up to a maximum reduction of 20 Armor.

10.name: Dragonstrike
10.description: After 1.5 seconds, summon a pair of Spirit Dragons which travel forward, dealing 84 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to enemy Heroes in its area. Enemies in the center take 75% increased damage.
10.longDescription: After 1.5 seconds, summon a pair of Spirit Dragons which travel forward, dealing 84 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to enemy Heroes in its area. Enemies in the center take 75% increased damage.

10.name: Dragon's Arrow
10.description: Fire a missile that travels across the battleground. Explodes upon hitting an enemy Hero, dealing 130 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  After traveling a medium distance, the damage is increased to 260 (+4% per level) and the Stun duration to 1.25 seconds.  After traveling a long distance, the damage is increased to 390 (+4% per level) and the Stun duration to 2 seconds.
10.longDescription: Fire a missile that travels across the battleground. Explodes upon hitting an enemy Hero, dealing 130 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  After traveling a medium distance, the damage is increased to 260 (+4% per level) and the Stun duration to 1.25 seconds.  After traveling a long distance, the damage is increased to 390 (+4% per level) and the Stun duration to 2 seconds.

13.name: Fleet of Foot
13.description: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants 10% Movement Speed for 6 seconds, up to 30%.
13.longDescription: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants 10% Movement Speed for 6 seconds, up to 30%.

13.name: Ninja Assassin
13.description: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow lowers Natural Agility's cooldown by 10 seconds. Additionally, Hero Takedowns reset Natural Agility's cooldown.
13.longDescription: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow lowers Natural Agility's cooldown by 10 seconds. Additionally, Hero Takedowns reset Natural Agility's cooldown.

13.name: Mounted Archery
13.description: Reduce the cooldown of Summon Mount by 2 seconds. Upon mounting, gain 25% additional Movement Speed for 5 seconds. Using Natural Agility instantly mounts.
13.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Summon Mount by 2 seconds. Upon mounting, gain 25% additional Movement Speed for 5 seconds. Using Natural Agility instantly mounts.

16.name: Flawless Technique
16.description: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow increases the damage of Hanzo's next Basic Attack within 5 seconds by 40%. Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the damage of Hanzo's next Storm Bow within 5 seconds by 40%.
16.longDescription: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow increases the damage of Hanzo's next Basic Attack within 5 seconds by 40%. Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the damage of Hanzo's next Storm Bow within 5 seconds by 40%.

16.name: Piercing Arrows
16.description: Storm Bow and Scatter Arrow pierce, hitting an additional enemy. Additionally, Scatter Arrow can pierce through 1 enemy each time it ricochets.
16.longDescription: Storm Bow and Scatter Arrow pierce, hitting an additional enemy. Additionally, Scatter Arrow can pierce through 1 enemy each time it ricochets.

16.name: Giant Slayer
16.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Scatter Arrow and Basic Attacks take a bonus 1.6% of their maximum Health as damage.
16.longDescription: Enemy Heroes hit by Scatter Arrow and Basic Attacks take a bonus 1.6% of their maximum Health as damage.

20.name: The Dragon Awakens
20.description: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow, Scatter Arrow, or Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Dragonstrike by 4 seconds.
20.longDescription: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow, Scatter Arrow, or Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Dragonstrike by 4 seconds.

20.name: Play of the Game
20.description: While in flight or for up to 2 seconds after impacting a target, Dragon's Arrow can be reactivated to teleport to its location and jump backwards. If used after impact, Hanzo shoots arrows that deal 132 (+4% per level) damage to each target hit by the impact.  Hanzo is Unstoppable during Play of the Game.
20.longDescription: While in flight or for up to 2 seconds after impacting a target, Dragon's Arrow can be reactivated to teleport to its location and jump backwards. If used after impact, Hanzo shoots arrows that deal 132 (+4% per level) damage to each target hit by the impact.  Hanzo is Unstoppable during Play of the Game.

20.name: Bullseye
20.description: Increase Sonic Arrow's speed and center radius by 100%. Additionally, Heroes hit by Sonic Arrow's center are Stunned for 1 second.
20.longDescription: Increase Sonic Arrow's speed and center radius by 100%. Additionally, Heroes hit by Sonic Arrow's center are Stunned for 1 second.

20.name: Perfect Agility

1.name: Scroll of Identify

Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Scroll of Sealing reveals and reduces the Armor of Heroes hit by 10 for 4 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, this talent's Armor reduction effect is increased to 15 and its duration to 6 seconds.
1.longDescription: Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with Scroll of Sealing permanently increases its damage by 2.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Scroll of Sealing reveals and reduces the Armor of Heroes hit by 10 for 4 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, this talent's Armor reduction effect is increased to 15 and its duration to 6 seconds.

1.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit by Scroll of Sealing grants 20% Spell Power for 16 seconds, up to 40%.

1.longDescription: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100% and its slow by 30%.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.

4.longDescription: Whenever an ally is healed by a Healing Potion, they gain a 140 (+4% per level) Shield for 6 seconds.

4.longDescription: Healing Potions restore 15 Mana and heal for an additional 114 (+4% per level) over 3 seconds.

4.longDescription: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100%  and it spawns 3 Lesser Healing Potions from each enemy Hero hit, healing allied Heroes for 250 (+4% per level) when picked up. Lesser Healing Potions last for 10 seconds.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.

7.name: Cube Mastery
7.description: Reduce the Mana cost of Scroll of Sealing from 40 to 25. Each enemy Hero hit by Horadric Cube reduces the cooldown of Scroll of Sealing by 4 seconds.
7.longDescription: Reduce the Mana cost of Scroll of Sealing from 40 to 25. Each enemy Hero hit by Horadric Cube reduces the cooldown of Scroll of Sealing by 4 seconds.

7.longDescription: Horadric Cube reduces Hero damage dealt by 30% for 4 seconds.

7.description: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100% and have it reduce the healing received of enemy Heroes by 75% for 4 seconds.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
7.longDescription: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100% and have it reduce the healing received of enemy Heroes by 75% for 4 seconds.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.

10.name: Stay Awhile and Listen

10.longDescription: After 1 second, Channel for 3 seconds, putting enemy Heroes in front of Deckard to Sleep while Channeling, and for 2 seconds after.  Enemies can only be put to Sleep once per cast, and Sleep's effects end instantly if they take damage.

10.description: Vector Targeting After 1 second, create a twirling tome tornado that travels towards the targeted direction, continually knocking away enemies that come into contact with it. Deals 20 (+4% per level) damage to Heroes hit.
10.longDescription: Vector Targeting After 1 second, create a twirling tome tornado that travels towards the targeted direction, continually knocking away enemies that come into contact with it. Deals 20 (+4% per level) damage to Heroes hit.

13.name: Super Healing Potion
13.description: If a Healing Potion isn't picked up for at least 2 seconds, it heals for 100% more.  Passive: Healing Potion heals for 25% more when the target is under 50% health.
13.longDescription: If a Healing Potion isn't picked up for at least 2 seconds, it heals for 100% more.  Passive: Healing Potion heals for 25% more when the target is under 50% health.

13.longDescription: When a Healing Potion is picked up, it also heals all nearby allied Heroes for 75% of the healing amount.

13.name: Ancient Blessings

16.longDescription: Scroll of Sealing deals 200% more damage when hitting at least 2 Heroes.

16.longDescription: If at least 2 allied Heroes are nearby, Fortitude of the Faithful grants an additional 10 Armor, 50% Mana Regeneration per second, and causes Deckard's Basic Abilities to recharge an additional 50% faster.

16.longDescription: Every 5 seconds, Deckard's next Basic Attack Stuns Heroes for 0.75 seconds.

20.longDescription: Stay Awhile and Listen Silences and Blinds enemies for 3 seconds upon waking up from Sleep.

20.longDescription: Lorenado gains an additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds every time an enemy Hero is knocked back. This effect can only occur once per 0.5 seconds.

20.longDescription: After use, Healing Potions recharge after 8 seconds.

20.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of all Gems to 5 seconds and the cooldown of Horadric Cube by 6 seconds.

1.longDescription: Nature's Toxin reveals enemies for its duration.

1.longDescription: After not Basic Attacking or taking damage for 2 seconds, increase the Move Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness by 10%.

4.longDescription: Increases Noxious Blossom's cast range by 25%. and its radius by 20%. Blossom Swell applies 1 additional stack of Nature's Toxin to enemies hit.

4.longDescription: Increases Nature's Toxin's damage by 125% to non-Heroes.

4.longDescription: While at least one enemy is afflicted by Nature's Toxin, heal for 9 (+4% per level) per second. When an enemy Hero has 3 stacks of Nature's Toxin, increase this healing by 19 (+4% per level) per second.

7.name: Splintered Spear

When Lunara uses her Basic Attack, it hits an additional enemy for each stack of Splintered Spear, consuming 1 stack for each target. Stores up to 3 stacks.  Splintered Spear deals 90 (+4% per level) damage, and applies Nature's Toxin.
7.longDescription: Casting Noxious Blossom grants Lunara 3 stacks of Splintered Spear. When Lunara uses her Basic Attack, it hits an additional enemy for each stack of Splintered Spear, consuming 1 stack for each target. Stores up to 3 stacks.  Splintered Spear deals 90 (+4% per level) damage, and applies Nature's Toxin.

7.longDescription: Noxious Blossom deals 100% more damage to enemies afflicted by Nature's Toxin, increased to 175% against enemies with 3 stacks.

7.longDescription: Using Crippling Spores increases the damage of Lunara's next 4 Basic Attacks by 70%.

10.longDescription: Send forth vines that deal 184 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in a line.  Stores up to 3 charges.

10.longDescription: Leap over an enemy, Slowing them by 80% for 0.35 seconds and dealing 271 (+4% per level) damage.  Stores up to 2 charges.

16.longDescription: Reduce the Mana cost of Noxious Blossom from 60 to 40. While at least 1 enemy Hero is afflicted with Nature's Toxin, Noxious Blossom's cooldown recharges 75% faster.

16.longDescription: Increase Lunara's Basic Attack range by 0.5. Using Crippling Spores increases Lunara's Basic Attack range by an additional 2.25 for 6 seconds.

1.longDescription: Killing a Minion with Pufferfish grants a stack of Bribe. Use 8 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries.  Maximum of 32 stacks of Bribe.

4.longDescription: Quest: Slime enemy Heroes that are already Slimed.  Reward: After Sliming 10 Heroes, increase Slime's bonus damage by 125.  Reward: After Sliming 20 Heroes, increase Slime's slow amount to 30%.

10.longDescription: After 0.75 seconds, Murky commands a legion of Murlocs to march in a target direction, each one leaping onto the first enemy Hero or Structure they find. Each Murloc deals 130 (+4% per level) damage and slows its target by 15% for 5 seconds. Murlocs deal 50% damage to Structures.

10.longDescription: Murky becomes Unstoppable and Stuns target enemy Hero for 3 seconds while he hits them for 1 damage a second.

20.longDescription: March of the Murlocs can be channeled, sending little Murlocs indefinitely. In addition, March of the Murlocs no longer deals reduced damage to structures.

Passive: While on Creep, each Basic Attack reduces all of Zagara's cooldowns by 0.4 seconds.

Passive: While on Creep, each Basic Attack reduces all of Zagara's cooldowns by 0.4 seconds.
