4.name: Withering Flames
4.description: Igniting an enemy Hero reduces their Spell Power by 60% for 4 seconds.
4.longDescription: Igniting an enemy Hero reduces their Spell Power by 60% for 4 seconds.

7.name: Gift of the Ox
7.description: Increase the duration of Stagger's damage prevention by 2 seconds, and reduce the amount of damage taken over time to 50% of damage taken.
7.longDescription: Increase the duration of Stagger's damage prevention by 2 seconds, and reduce the amount of damage taken over time to 50% of damage taken.

7.name: Brewmaster's Balance
7.description: While at or below 50 Brew, gain 20% Movement Speed. While at or above 50 Brew, regenerate an additional 18 (+4% per level) Health per second.
7.longDescription: While at or below 50 Brew, gain 20% Movement Speed. While at or above 50 Brew, regenerate an additional 18 (+4% per level) Health per second.

7.name: Elusive Brawler
7.description: Activate to gain 30% Movement Speed and Evade enemy Basic Attacks for 2 seconds. Chen's Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by 2 seconds.
7.longDescription: Activate to gain 30% Movement Speed and Evade enemy Basic Attacks for 2 seconds. Chen's Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by 2 seconds.

10.name: Wandering Keg
10.description: Roll around inside an Unstoppable barrel with 70% increased Movement Speed and 25 Armor, dealing 59 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the way and knocking them back. Lasts for 5 seconds.
10.longDescription: Roll around inside an Unstoppable barrel with 70% increased Movement Speed and 25 Armor, dealing 59 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the way and knocking them back. Lasts for 5 seconds.

10.name: Storm, Earth, Fire
10.description: After 1 second, Chen splits into three elemental spirits for 12 seconds, each with 70% of Chen's maximum Health and a unique Ability. The last spirit Ability that is cast is empowered. If all three spirits are killed, Chen will die as well.  Storm can grant the spirits a Shield.  Earth can leap to an area and Slow enemies.  Fire can grant the spirits Attack Speed, damage.
10.longDescription: After 1 second, Chen splits into three elemental spirits for 12 seconds, each with 70% of Chen's maximum Health and a unique Ability. The last spirit Ability that is cast is empowered. If all three spirits are killed, Chen will die as well.  Storm can grant the spirits a Shield.  Earth can leap to an area and Slow enemies.  Fire can grant the spirits Attack Speed, damage.

13.name: Pressure Point
13.description: Flying Kick Slows the target enemy by 40% for 1 second, or by 80% if Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew.
13.longDescription: Flying Kick Slows the target enemy by 40% for 1 second, or by 80% if Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew.

13.name: A Touch of Honey
13.description: Increase the Slows from Keg Smash by 30% and its duration by 0.5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Increase the Slows from Keg Smash by 30% and its duration by 0.5 seconds.

13.name: Ring of Fire
13.description: After Igniting an enemy, become bathed in a fiery aura, dealing 60 (+4% per level) damage every second to nearby enemies for 6 seconds.
13.longDescription: After Igniting an enemy, become bathed in a fiery aura, dealing 60 (+4% per level) damage every second to nearby enemies for 6 seconds.

13.name: Enough to Share
13.description: Fortifying Brew instantly grants Chen a Shield that absorbs 180 (+4% per level) damage, and each second grants nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs 140 (+4% per level) damage, up to 420 (+4% per level).
13.longDescription: Fortifying Brew instantly grants Chen a Shield that absorbs 180 (+4% per level) damage, and each second grants nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs 140 (+4% per level) damage, up to 420 (+4% per level).

16.name: Flying Leap
16.description: Increase Flying Kick's range by 15% and reduce its cooldown by 0.5 seconds each time an enemy Hero takes damage from being Ignited.
16.longDescription: Increase Flying Kick's range by 15% and reduce its cooldown by 0.5 seconds each time an enemy Hero takes damage from being Ignited.

16.name: Celerity
16.description: Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Stagger by 2 seconds and grant Chen 30 Armor for 3 seconds.
16.longDescription: Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Stagger by 2 seconds and grant Chen 30 Armor for 3 seconds.

16.name: Combo Strikes
16.description: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same target deals 75% bonus damage. While Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew and for 2 seconds after, he gains 35% Attack Speed.
16.longDescription: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same target deals 75% bonus damage. While Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew and for 2 seconds after, he gains 35% Attack Speed.

20.name: Untapped Potential
20.description: Increase Wandering Keg's Movement Speed bonus from 70% to 125%, and its Armor bonus to 75 for its duration and 5 seconds afterwards.
20.longDescription: Increase Wandering Keg's Movement Speed bonus from 70% to 125%, and its Armor bonus to 75 for its duration and 5 seconds afterwards.

20.name: Elemental Conduit
20.description: Increase the spirits' Health to 100% of Chen's maximum Health and all of their Abilities are empowered.
20.longDescription: Increase the spirits' Health to 100% of Chen's maximum Health and all of their Abilities are empowered.

20.name: Purifying Brew
20.description: Casting Fortifying Brew grants Chen Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Casting Fortifying Brew grants Chen Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds.

20.name: Energizing Brew
20.description: If Chen Channels Fortifying Brew for its full duration, then he gains 20% bonus Health and 20% bonus damage for 25 seconds.
20.longDescription: If Chen Channels Fortifying Brew for its full duration, then he gains 20% bonus Health and 20% bonus damage for 25 seconds.

1.name: Boneslicer
1.description: Grievous Throw now pierces through all enemies hit and restores 15 Mana per Hero hit. Additionally, Grievous Throw's mark is no longer removed by Basic Attacks.
1.longDescription: Grievous Throw now pierces through all enemies hit and restores 15 Mana per Hero hit. Additionally, Grievous Throw's mark is no longer removed by Basic Attacks.

1.name: Recklessness
1.description: While Zul'jin is below 75% Health, he gains 10% Spell Power. While he is below 50% Health, his Basic Attack damage is increased by 10% and Basic Attacks against Heroes grant an additional stack of You Want Axe?.
1.longDescription: While Zul'jin is below 75% Health, he gains 10% Spell Power. While he is below 50% Health, his Basic Attack damage is increased by 10% and Basic Attacks against Heroes grant an additional stack of You Want Axe?.

1.name: Headhunter
1.description: Quest: Zul'jin's first Takedown against each enemy Hero permanently increases his damage dealt by 2.5%.  Reward: After getting Takedowns on every enemy Hero, Basic Attack range is increased by 1.1.
1.longDescription: Quest: Zul'jin's first Takedown against each enemy Hero permanently increases his damage dealt by 2.5%.  Reward: After getting Takedowns on every enemy Hero, Basic Attack range is increased by 1.1.

4.name: Troll's Blood
4.description: Increase Regeneration's healing by 25%. If Regeneration fully finishes, restore 10% of Zul'jin's maximum Mana.
4.longDescription: Increase Regeneration's healing by 25%. If Regeneration fully finishes, restore 10% of Zul'jin's maximum Mana.

4.name: Voodoo Shuffle
4.description: Activate to remove Roots and Slows.  Passive: Lower the cooldown and Mana cost of Regeneration by 40%.
4.longDescription: Activate to remove Roots and Slows.  Passive: Lower the cooldown and Mana cost of Regeneration by 40%.

4.name: Amani Hide
4.description: Lower the cooldown of Amani Rage by 10 seconds and gain 15 Armor while regenerating Health from it.
4.longDescription: Lower the cooldown of Amani Rage by 10 seconds and gain 15 Armor while regenerating Health from it.

7.name: Vicious Assault
7.description: Increase the duration of Grievous Throw's mark by 3 seconds and its damage bonus by 45%.
7.longDescription: Increase the duration of Grievous Throw's mark by 3 seconds and its damage bonus by 45%.

7.name: Arcanite Axes
7.description: Quest: Twin Cleave's damage is permanently increased by 0.75 every time it hits a Hero.
7.longDescription: Quest: Twin Cleave's damage is permanently increased by 0.75 every time it hits a Hero.

7.name: Ferocity
7.description: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Berserker by 40%.
7.longDescription: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Berserker by 40%.

10.name: Taz'dingo!
10.description: For the next 4 seconds, Zul'jin is Unkillable, and cannot be reduced to less than 1 Health. Taz'dingo!
10.longDescription: For the next 4 seconds, Zul'jin is Unkillable, and cannot be reduced to less than 1 Health. Taz'dingo!

10.name: Guillotine
10.description: Zul'jin launches a massive axe into the air that drops on the targeted area, dealing 330 (+4% per level) damage plus bonus damage the lower his Health is.
10.longDescription: Zul'jin launches a massive axe into the air that drops on the targeted area, dealing 330 (+4% per level) damage plus bonus damage the lower his Health is.

13.name: Lacerate
13.description: Increase the Slow amount of each Twin Cleave axe by 10% and its duration by 0.5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Increase the Slow amount of each Twin Cleave axe by 10% and its duration by 0.5 seconds.

13.name: Eye of Zul'jin
13.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant Zul'jin 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%.
13.longDescription: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant Zul'jin 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%.

13.name: Ensnare
13.description: Throw a net forward, Rooting the first enemy Hero hit for 1.5 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, Ensnare's cooldown is reduced to 10 seconds.
13.longDescription: Throw a net forward, Rooting the first enemy Hero hit for 1.5 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, Ensnare's cooldown is reduced to 10 seconds.

16.name: No Mercy!
16.description: Zul'jin's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes marked with Grievous Throw ignore Armor and deal an additional 2% of maximum Health as damage.
16.longDescription: Zul'jin's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes marked with Grievous Throw ignore Armor and deal an additional 2% of maximum Health as damage.

16.name: Wrong Place Wrong Time
16.description: If an enemy is hit by both Twin Cleave axes at the same time, they take an additional 100 (+4% per level) damage and count as 5 Hero hits for You Want Axe?.
16.longDescription: If an enemy is hit by both Twin Cleave axes at the same time, they take an additional 100 (+4% per level) damage and count as 5 Hero hits for You Want Axe?.

16.name: Let the Killing Begin
16.description: When Zul'jin kills an enemy, his Attack Speed is increased by 5%, up to 40%, for 12 seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration.  Hero Takedowns instantly grant 40% Attack Speed.
16.longDescription: When Zul'jin kills an enemy, his Attack Speed is increased by 5%, up to 40%, for 12 seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration.  Hero Takedowns instantly grant 40% Attack Speed.

20.name: Amani Resilience
20.description: Increase Taz'dingo's duration by 1 second. Upon expiring, Zul'jin heals for 50% of the damage he dealt during Taz'dingo.
20.longDescription: Increase Taz'dingo's duration by 1 second. Upon expiring, Zul'jin heals for 50% of the damage he dealt during Taz'dingo.

20.name: Buzzsaw
20.description: After impact, Guillotine continues forward, dealing 75% damage to enemies hit. If a Hero is killed by Guillotine, Zul'jin is instantly healed to full.
20.longDescription: After impact, Guillotine continues forward, dealing 75% damage to enemies hit. If a Hero is killed by Guillotine, Zul'jin is instantly healed to full.

20.name: Forest Medicine
20.description: Regeneration is no longer Channeled, and cannot be interrupted.
20.longDescription: Regeneration is no longer Channeled, and cannot be interrupted.

20.name: A Surprise For Ya
20.description: Basic Attacks bounce to a nearby enemy for 50% damage, prioritizing enemy Heroes.
20.longDescription: Basic Attacks bounce to a nearby enemy for 50% damage, prioritizing enemy Heroes.

1.name: Feast on Fear
1.description: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower heals Diablo for 10% of his maximum Health over 3 seconds.
1.longDescription: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower heals Diablo for 10% of his maximum Health over 3 seconds.

1.name: Devil's Due
1.description: Black Soulstone increases the effects of Regen Globes and Healing Fountains by 2.25% per Soul.
1.longDescription: Black Soulstone increases the effects of Regen Globes and Healing Fountains by 2.25% per Soul.

1.name: Soul Shield
1.description: Activate to gain 25 plus 50% of Diablo's current Souls as Spell Armor for 4 seconds. Every time Diablo damages an enemy Hero, reduce this cooldown by 1 second.
1.longDescription: Activate to gain 25 plus 50% of Diablo's current Souls as Spell Armor for 4 seconds. Every time Diablo damages an enemy Hero, reduce this cooldown by 1 second.

4.name: Sacrificial Soul
4.description: Stunning a Hero with Shadow Charge grants 10 Souls and 20 Armor for 3 seconds. While at 100 Souls, increase this Armor to 40.
4.longDescription: Stunning a Hero with Shadow Charge grants 10 Souls and 20 Armor for 3 seconds. While at 100 Souls, increase this Armor to 40.

4.name: Souls to the Flame
4.description: Fire Stomp grants 1 Soul every 3 times it damages an enemy Hero, and heals for an additional 1.3% of its damage dealt per Soul.
4.longDescription: Fire Stomp grants 1 Soul every 3 times it damages an enemy Hero, and heals for an additional 1.3% of its damage dealt per Soul.

4.name: Life Leech
4.description: Diablo gains 1 Soul and heals for 1.75% of his maximum Health when Basic Attacking an enemy Hero. While at 100 Souls, increase this healing to 3.5% of his maximum Health.
4.longDescription: Diablo gains 1 Soul and heals for 1.75% of his maximum Health when Basic Attacking an enemy Hero. While at 100 Souls, increase this healing to 3.5% of his maximum Health.

7.name: Eternal Flames
7.description: Reduce the cooldown of Fire Stomp by 1 second. When Diablo Stuns an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower, reset the cooldown of Fire Stomp and restore 45 Mana.
7.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Fire Stomp by 1 second. When Diablo Stuns an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower, reset the cooldown of Fire Stomp and restore 45 Mana.

7.name: Malevolence
7.description: Basic Abilities cause Diablo's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds to deal an additional 100 (+4% per level) Spell Damage. Stores up to 2 charges.
7.longDescription: Basic Abilities cause Diablo's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds to deal an additional 100 (+4% per level) Spell Damage. Stores up to 2 charges.

7.name: Diabolical Momentum
7.description: When Diablo's Basic Attacks damage enemies, reduce the cooldown of Shadow Charge and Overpower by 1.5 seconds.
7.longDescription: When Diablo's Basic Attacks damage enemies, reduce the cooldown of Shadow Charge and Overpower by 1.5 seconds.

10.name: Apocalypse
10.description: Create a demonic rune under each enemy Hero on the battleground. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes dealing 137 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 1.75 seconds.
10.longDescription: Create a demonic rune under each enemy Hero on the battleground. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes dealing 137 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 1.75 seconds.

10.name: Lightning Breath
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, become Unstoppable and Channel for up to 4 seconds, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies in front of Diablo. Enemies affected are Slowed by 4% for 2 seconds, up to 40%.  Lightning Breath's direction changes with your mouse cursor position.
10.longDescription: After 0.5 seconds, become Unstoppable and Channel for up to 4 seconds, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies in front of Diablo. Enemies affected are Slowed by 4% for 2 seconds, up to 40%.  Lightning Breath's direction changes with your mouse cursor position.

13.name: Devastating Charge
13.description: Increase Shadow Charge's terrain collision damage by 50%.  Quest: Hit an enemy Hero against terrain 5 times.  Reward: Hitting enemy Heroes against terrain reduces their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds.
13.longDescription: Increase Shadow Charge's terrain collision damage by 50%.  Quest: Hit an enemy Hero against terrain 5 times.  Reward: Hitting enemy Heroes against terrain reduces their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds.

13.name: Hellfire
13.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Fire Stomp grants 3% Spell Power for 10 seconds, up to 30%. While at maximum stacks, Diablo deals 33 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.
13.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit by Fire Stomp grants 3% Spell Power for 10 seconds, up to 30%. While at maximum stacks, Diablo deals 33 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.

13.name: Cruelty
13.description: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower increases Diablo's Attack Speed by 50% for 7 seconds, up to 100%.
13.longDescription: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower increases Diablo's Attack Speed by 50% for 7 seconds, up to 100%.

16.name: Domination
16.description: Casting Overpower resets the cooldown of Shadow Charge.
16.longDescription: Casting Overpower resets the cooldown of Shadow Charge.

16.name: Debilitating Flames
16.description: Enemy Heroes hit by Fire Stomp are Slowed by 6% for 4 seconds, up to 60%. Heroes Slowed by 24% or more by Debilitating Flames deal 50% less damage.
16.longDescription: Enemy Heroes hit by Fire Stomp are Slowed by 6% for 4 seconds, up to 60%. Heroes Slowed by 24% or more by Debilitating Flames deal 50% less damage.

16.name: Overpowering Nightmare
16.description: Gain 2 additional charges of Overpower, with a 2 second cooldown between uses.
16.longDescription: Gain 2 additional charges of Overpower, with a 2 second cooldown between uses.

20.name: Dying Breath
20.description: Apocalypse's cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds for every enemy Hero hit (to a minimum of 5 seconds) and is cast for free when Diablo dies.
20.longDescription: Apocalypse's cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds for every enemy Hero hit (to a minimum of 5 seconds) and is cast for free when Diablo dies.

20.name: Hellstorm
20.description: Lightning Breath lasts 200% longer.
20.longDescription: Lightning Breath lasts 200% longer.

20.name: Lord of Terror
20.description: Activate to steal 10% of the maximum Health of nearby enemy Heroes and gain 5 Souls per Hero hit.
20.longDescription: Activate to steal 10% of the maximum Health of nearby enemy Heroes and gain 5 Souls per Hero hit.

20.name: Hellgate
20.description: Teleport and place a demonic rune at target location. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes dealing 137 (+4% per level) damage and stunning enemies for 1.75 seconds.
20.longDescription: Teleport and place a demonic rune at target location. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes dealing 137 (+4% per level) damage and stunning enemies for 1.75 seconds.

1.name: Longshot
1.description: Increases the cast range of Pinning Shot by 30%. Pinning Shot also increases the range of Nova's next Basic Attack by 2.3.
1.longDescription: Increases the cast range of Pinning Shot by 30%. Pinning Shot also increases the range of Nova's next Basic Attack by 2.3.

1.name: Covert Ops
1.description: After being Stealthed for 2 seconds, Pinning Shot's Slow is increased to 60% and costs no Mana. Bonus is lost after losing Stealth for 1 second.
1.longDescription: After being Stealthed for 2 seconds, Pinning Shot's Slow is increased to 60% and costs no Mana. Bonus is lost after losing Stealth for 1 second.

1.name: Advanced Cloaking
1.description: After being Stealthed for 1 second, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed. While Stealthed, regenerate 6 Mana per second.
1.longDescription: After being Stealthed for 1 second, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed. While Stealthed, regenerate 6 Mana per second.

4.name: Rapid Projection
4.description: Reduces Holo Decoy's cooldown and Mana cost by 60%.
4.longDescription: Reduces Holo Decoy's cooldown and Mana cost by 60%.

4.name: Holo Stability
4.description: Increase the cast range of Holo Decoy by 100% and its duration by 120%.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Ghost Protocol by 15 seconds.
4.longDescription: Increase the cast range of Holo Decoy by 100% and its duration by 120%.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Ghost Protocol by 15 seconds.

4.name: Covert Mission
4.description: Enemy Minions killed near Nova grant a stack of Bribe. Hero Takedowns grant 10 stacks of Bribe. Use 25 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum of 100 stacks. If a camp is defeated entirely with Bribe, the camp respawns 50% faster.
4.longDescription: Enemy Minions killed near Nova grant a stack of Bribe. Hero Takedowns grant 10 stacks of Bribe. Use 25 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum of 100 stacks. If a camp is defeated entirely with Bribe, the camp respawns 50% faster.

7.name: Perfect Shot
7.description: Hitting an enemy with Snipe reduces its cooldown by 2 seconds and refunds half its Mana cost, doubled against enemy Heroes.
7.longDescription: Hitting an enemy with Snipe reduces its cooldown by 2 seconds and refunds half its Mana cost, doubled against enemy Heroes.

7.name: One in the Chamber
7.description: After using an Ability, Nova's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals 65% additional damage.
7.longDescription: After using an Ability, Nova's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals 65% additional damage.

7.name: Anti-Armor Shells
7.description: Nova's Basic Attacks deal 250% damage and decrease the Physical Armor of Heroic targets by 15 for 4 seconds, but her Attack Speed is proportionally slower.
7.longDescription: Nova's Basic Attacks deal 250% damage and decrease the Physical Armor of Heroic targets by 15 for 4 seconds, but her Attack Speed is proportionally slower.

10.name: Triple Tap
10.description: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires 3 shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for 372 (+4% per level) damage each.
10.longDescription: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires 3 shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for 372 (+4% per level) damage each.

10.name: Precision Strike
10.description: After a 1.5 second delay, deals 435 (+4% per level) damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.
10.longDescription: After a 1.5 second delay, deals 435 (+4% per level) damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.

13.name: Psionic Efficiency
13.description: Snipe's range is increased by 15% and hitting a Hero grants an additional stack of Precision Sniper.
13.longDescription: Snipe's range is increased by 15% and hitting a Hero grants an additional stack of Precision Sniper.

13.name: Double Tap
13.description: Pinning Shot now has 2 charges, but its cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.
13.longDescription: Pinning Shot now has 2 charges, but its cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.

13.name: Ionic Force Field
13.description: Gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds after losing Stealth.
13.longDescription: Gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds after losing Stealth.

16.name: Explosive Round
16.description: Snipe also deals 90% damage to enemies near the impact.
16.longDescription: Snipe also deals 90% damage to enemies near the impact.

16.name: Crippling Shot
16.description: Pinning Shot lowers a Hero's Armor by 20 for the duration of the Slow, causing them to take 20% increased damage.
16.longDescription: Pinning Shot lowers a Hero's Armor by 20 for the duration of the Slow, causing them to take 20% increased damage.

16.name: Lethal Decoy
16.description: Increases the damage Holo Decoy deals to 30% of Nova's damage.
16.longDescription: Increases the damage Holo Decoy deals to 30% of Nova's damage.

20.name: Fast Reload
20.description: Triple Tap's cooldown is reset if it kills an enemy Hero.
20.longDescription: Triple Tap's cooldown is reset if it kills an enemy Hero.

20.name: Precision Barrage
20.description: Precision Strike gains a 2nd charge and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.
20.longDescription: Precision Strike gains a 2nd charge and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.

20.name: Apollo Suit
20.description: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by 2 seconds.
20.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by 2 seconds.

20.name: Rewind
20.description: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.
20.longDescription: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.

1.name: Pressurized Glands
1.description: Increases the range of Symbiote's Spike Burst by 25% and decreases the cooldown by 1 second.
1.longDescription: Increases the range of Symbiote's Spike Burst by 25% and decreases the cooldown by 1 second.

1.name: Envenomed Nest
1.description: Toxic Nests deal 75% more damage over 3 seconds and reduce the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 10 for 4 seconds.
1.longDescription: Toxic Nests deal 75% more damage over 3 seconds and reduce the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 10 for 4 seconds.

1.name: Reinforced Carapace
1.description: Increase the Shield amount of Carapace by 40%.
1.longDescription: Increase the Shield amount of Carapace by 40%.

1.name: Survival Instincts
1.description: Increases Locust's Health by 100% and damage by 60%.
1.longDescription: Increases Locust's Health by 100% and damage by 60%.

4.name: Adrenal Overload
4.description: Heroic Symbiote hosts gain 25% increased Attack Speed.
4.longDescription: Heroic Symbiote hosts gain 25% increased Attack Speed.

4.name: Needlespine
4.description: Increases the damage and range of Symbiote's Stab by 20%.
4.longDescription: Increases the damage and range of Symbiote's Stab by 20%.

4.name: Prolific Dispersal
4.description: Increase the duration of Toxic Nests by 45 seconds, reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds, and add 2 additional charges.
4.longDescription: Increase the duration of Toxic Nests by 45 seconds, reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds, and add 2 additional charges.

7.name: Vile Nest
7.description: Toxic Nests Slow enemy Movement Speed by 40% for 2.5 seconds.
7.longDescription: Toxic Nests Slow enemy Movement Speed by 40% for 2.5 seconds.

7.name: Networked Carapace
7.description: Using Symbiote's Carapace also applies an untalented Carapace Shield to all nearby allied Heroes, Minions, and Mercenaries.
7.longDescription: Using Symbiote's Carapace also applies an untalented Carapace Shield to all nearby allied Heroes, Minions, and Mercenaries.

7.name: Calldown: MULE
7.description: Activate to calldown a Mule that repairs Structures, one at a time, near target point for 40 seconds, healing for 90 Health every 1 second.
7.longDescription: Activate to calldown a Mule that repairs Structures, one at a time, near target point for 40 seconds, healing for 90 Health every 1 second.

10.name: Ultimate Evolution
10.description: Clone target allied Hero and control it for 20 seconds. Abathur has perfected the clone, granting it 20% Spell Power, 20% bonus Attack Damage, and 10% bonus Movement Speed. Cannot use their Heroic Ability.
10.longDescription: Clone target allied Hero and control it for 20 seconds. Abathur has perfected the clone, granting it 20% Spell Power, 20% bonus Attack Damage, and 10% bonus Movement Speed. Cannot use their Heroic Ability.

10.name: Evolve Monstrosity
10.description: Turn an allied Minion or Locust into a Monstrosity. When enemy Minions near the Monstrosity die, it gains 2% Health and 2% Basic Attack damage, stacking up to 40 times. The Monstrosity can be healed by Carapace and has the ability to Burrow to a visible location every 80 seconds.  Using Symbiote on the Monstrosity allows Abathur to control it, in addition to Symbiote's normal benefits. This Ability can be reactivated to automatically cast Symbiote on his Monstrosity.
10.longDescription: Turn an allied Minion or Locust into a Monstrosity. When enemy Minions near the Monstrosity die, it gains 2% Health and 2% Basic Attack damage, stacking up to 40 times. The Monstrosity can be healed by Carapace and has the ability to Burrow to a visible location every 80 seconds.  Using Symbiote on the Monstrosity allows Abathur to control it, in addition to Symbiote's normal benefits. This Ability can be reactivated to automatically cast Symbiote on his Monstrosity.

13.name: Spatial Efficiency
13.description: Symbiote's Stab gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by .5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Symbiote's Stab gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by .5 seconds.

13.name: Soma Transference
13.description: Symbiote's Spike Burst heals the host for 64 (+4% per level) Health per enemy Hero hit.
13.longDescription: Symbiote's Spike Burst heals the host for 64 (+4% per level) Health per enemy Hero hit.

13.name: Bombard Strain
13.description: Locust's Basic Attacks become a long-range siege attack and their duration is increased by 75%.
13.longDescription: Locust's Basic Attacks become a long-range siege attack and their duration is increased by 75%.

16.name: Envenomed Spikes
16.description: Abathur's Symbiote's Spike Burst also Slows enemy Movement Speed by 40% for 2 seconds.
16.longDescription: Abathur's Symbiote's Spike Burst also Slows enemy Movement Speed by 40% for 2 seconds.

16.name: Adrenaline Boost
16.description: Symbiote's Carapace increases the Movement Speed of the target by 40% for 3.5 seconds.
16.longDescription: Symbiote's Carapace increases the Movement Speed of the target by 40% for 3.5 seconds.

16.name: Volatile Mutation
16.description: Ultimate Evolution clones and Monstrosities deal 137 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies every 3 seconds and when they die. Enemy Heroes hit heal the clone or Monstrosity for 100% of the damage dealt.
16.longDescription: Ultimate Evolution clones and Monstrosities deal 137 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies every 3 seconds and when they die. Enemy Heroes hit heal the clone or Monstrosity for 100% of the damage dealt.

16.name: Locust Brood
16.description: Activate to spawn 3 Locusts at a nearby location.
16.longDescription: Activate to spawn 3 Locusts at a nearby location.

20.name: Evolutionary Link
20.description: Increase the duration of Ultimate Evolution by 50%. As long as the Ultimate Evolution is alive, the original target of the clone gains a Shield equal to 35% of their maximum Health. Refreshes every 5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Increase the duration of Ultimate Evolution by 50%. As long as the Ultimate Evolution is alive, the original target of the clone gains a Shield equal to 35% of their maximum Health. Refreshes every 5 seconds.

20.name: Evolution Complete
20.description: Increase Monstrosity's Basic Attack damage by 100%.
20.longDescription: Increase Monstrosity's Basic Attack damage by 100%.

20.name: Hivemind
20.description: Symbiote creates an additional Symbiote on a nearby allied Hero. This Symbiote mimics the commands of the first, but does half damage and Shielding.
20.longDescription: Symbiote creates an additional Symbiote on a nearby allied Hero. This Symbiote mimics the commands of the first, but does half damage and Shielding.

20.name: Locust Nest
20.description: Activate to create a nest that periodically spawns Locusts. Only one Locust Nest can be active at a time.
20.longDescription: Activate to create a nest that periodically spawns Locusts. Only one Locust Nest can be active at a time.

1.name: Swift as the Wind
1.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Swift Strike increases Genji's Movement Speed by 30% for 3 seconds.
1.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Swift Strike increases Genji's Movement Speed by 30% for 3 seconds.

1.name: Agile Dismount
1.description: While mounted the range of Cyber Agility is increased by 70%, its cooldown is reduced by 14 seconds, and it Slows enemy Heroes in its landing area by 25% for 2 seconds.
1.longDescription: While mounted the range of Cyber Agility is increased by 70%, its cooldown is reduced by 14 seconds, and it Slows enemy Heroes in its landing area by 25% for 2 seconds.

1.name: Pathfinder
1.description: Jumping over terrain with Cyber Agility increases Movement Speed by 30%, and grants Stealth, for 4 seconds.  Passive: Genji's Heroic Ability heals him for 10% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes, increasing up to 30% the lower Genji's Health is.
1.longDescription: Jumping over terrain with Cyber Agility increases Movement Speed by 30%, and grants Stealth, for 4 seconds.  Passive: Genji's Heroic Ability heals him for 10% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes, increasing up to 30% the lower Genji's Health is.

4.name: Shuriken Mastery
4.description: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Shuriken.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Shuriken damage is increased by 25.  Reward: After hitting 60 Heroes, Cyber Agility now refunds 3 charges of Shuriken.
4.longDescription: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Shuriken.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Shuriken damage is increased by 25.  Reward: After hitting 60 Heroes, Cyber Agility now refunds 3 charges of Shuriken.

4.name: Strike At The Heart
4.description: Enemies hit by the end of Swift Strike take an additional 134 (+4% per level) damage after 1 second.
4.longDescription: Enemies hit by the end of Swift Strike take an additional 134 (+4% per level) damage after 1 second.

4.name: Dragon Claw
4.description: After Genji blocks 330 (+4% per level) damage with Deflect, activate to release a Dragon Claw, dealing 190 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies.
4.longDescription: After Genji blocks 330 (+4% per level) damage with Deflect, activate to release a Dragon Claw, dealing 190 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies.

7.name: Augmented Guard
7.description: When Deflect ends, Genji gains a Shield equal to 100% of the damage blocked for 4 seconds.
7.longDescription: When Deflect ends, Genji gains a Shield equal to 100% of the damage blocked for 4 seconds.

7.name: Perfect Defense
7.description: Deflected damage reduces the cooldown of Deflect by 2 seconds, up to a maximum of 10 seconds.
7.longDescription: Deflected damage reduces the cooldown of Deflect by 2 seconds, up to a maximum of 10 seconds.

7.name: Cyber Shield
7.description: Using Cyber Agility grants 40 Spell Armor for 4 seconds.  Passive: Genji dodges 1 Heroic Basic Attack every 5 seconds.
7.longDescription: Using Cyber Agility grants 40 Spell Armor for 4 seconds.  Passive: Genji dodges 1 Heroic Basic Attack every 5 seconds.

10.name: Dragonblade
10.description: Unleash the Dragonblade for 8 seconds. While active, Dragonblade can be reactivated to lunge forward and slash in a huge arc, dealing 240 (+4% per level) damage.
10.longDescription: Unleash the Dragonblade for 8 seconds. While active, Dragonblade can be reactivated to lunge forward and slash in a huge arc, dealing 240 (+4% per level) damage.

10.name: X-Strike
10.description: Perform two slashes dealing 145 (+4% per level) damage. The slashes detonate after 1.25 seconds causing an additional 290 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in their area.
10.longDescription: Perform two slashes dealing 145 (+4% per level) damage. The slashes detonate after 1.25 seconds causing an additional 290 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in their area.

13.name: Shingan
13.description: Hitting an enemy with all 3 Shuriken deals 100 (+4% per level) bonus damage. Deals 40% less damage to Structures.
13.longDescription: Hitting an enemy with all 3 Shuriken deals 100 (+4% per level) bonus damage. Deals 40% less damage to Structures.

13.name: Flow Like Water
13.description: Each enemy Hero hit with Swift Strike reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.
13.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit with Swift Strike reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.

13.name: Way Of The Shimada
13.description: Increase Genji's Basic Attack range by 1. Each time Genji hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack, increase his Basic Attack damage by 1% for 3 seconds, stacking up to 15%.
13.longDescription: Increase Genji's Basic Attack range by 1. Each time Genji hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack, increase his Basic Attack damage by 1% for 3 seconds, stacking up to 15%.

16.name: Reflect
16.description: Deflect also deals an additional 33% of the damage blocked.
16.longDescription: Deflect also deals an additional 33% of the damage blocked.

16.name: Final Cut
16.description: After 1 second, Swift Strike deals an additional 125 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in the area.
16.longDescription: After 1 second, Swift Strike deals an additional 125 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in the area.

16.name: Steady Blade
16.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Swift Strike increases the damage of the next Swift Strike by 30%. This bonus stacks up to 3 times.
16.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit by Swift Strike increases the damage of the next Swift Strike by 30%. This bonus stacks up to 3 times.

20.name: The Dragon Becomes Me
20.description: Each time Dragonblade hits an enemy Hero, the duration of Dragonblade is increased by 0.5 seconds. If a Hero is killed within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Dragonblade, Swift Strike's cooldown is reset.
20.longDescription: Each time Dragonblade hits an enemy Hero, the duration of Dragonblade is increased by 0.5 seconds. If a Hero is killed within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Dragonblade, Swift Strike's cooldown is reset.

20.name: Living Weapon
20.description: Each enemy Hero hit by X-Strike reduces its cooldown by 12.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Each enemy Hero hit by X-Strike reduces its cooldown by 12.5 seconds.

20.name: Sharpened Stars
20.description: Shuriken now pierce all enemies hit. Swift Strike's refund grants 1 charge of Shuriken.
20.longDescription: Shuriken now pierce all enemies hit. Swift Strike's refund grants 1 charge of Shuriken.

20.name: Zanshin
20.description: Quest: Block 6500 damage with Deflect, including damage blocked so far.  Reward: Deflect hits all nearby enemy Heroes.
20.longDescription: Quest: Block 6500 damage with Deflect, including damage blocked so far.  Reward: Deflect hits all nearby enemy Heroes.

1.name: Party Mix
1.description: Quest: Play Lúcio's Crossfade tracks to nearby allies. Multiple allies provide additional time.  Reward: For every 1 Minute played, permanently increase Lúcio's maximum Mana by 10.  Reward: Once you have played for 8 minutes or more, permanently increase Crossfade's radius by 20%.
1.longDescription: Quest: Play Lúcio's Crossfade tracks to nearby allies. Multiple allies provide additional time.  Reward: For every 1 Minute played, permanently increase Lúcio's maximum Mana by 10.  Reward: Once you have played for 8 minutes or more, permanently increase Crossfade's radius by 20%.

1.name: Accelerando
1.description: Wall Ride's Movement Speed bonus gradually increases to 40% over 6 seconds while Lúcio maintains its effect.
1.longDescription: Wall Ride's Movement Speed bonus gradually increases to 40% over 6 seconds while Lúcio maintains its effect.

1.name: Smooth Moves
1.description: While Wall Ride is active, Basic Attacks heal for 30% of the damage dealt and restore 0.5 Mana.  Passive: Increase Wall Ride duration by 1 second.
1.longDescription: While Wall Ride is active, Basic Attacks heal for 30% of the damage dealt and restore 0.5 Mana.  Passive: Increase Wall Ride duration by 1 second.

4.name: Subwoofer
4.description: Enemies within the first half of Soundwave's range are knocked back 75% further.  Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single Soundwave.  Reward: Increase Soundwave's arc by 50% and its range by 20%.
4.longDescription: Enemies within the first half of Soundwave's range are knocked back 75% further.  Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single Soundwave.  Reward: Increase Soundwave's arc by 50% and its range by 20%.

4.name: Off the Wall
4.description: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave while Wall Ride is active sets its cooldown to 5 seconds and refunds 15 Mana.
4.longDescription: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave while Wall Ride is active sets its cooldown to 5 seconds and refunds 15 Mana.

4.name: Supersonic
4.description: While Wall Ride is active, Push Off's cooldown recharges 100% faster.
4.longDescription: While Wall Ride is active, Push Off's cooldown recharges 100% faster.

7.name: Good Vibrations
7.description: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave grants Lúcio a 38 (+4% per level) Shield for 8 seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes grants 3 times this amount.
7.longDescription: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave grants Lúcio a 38 (+4% per level) Shield for 8 seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes grants 3 times this amount.

7.name: Reverse Amp
7.description: Blast Lúcio's active Crossfade track at enemy Heroes. While Amp It Up is active, Healing Boost deals 50 (+4% per level) damage per second and Speed Boost Slows by 20%.  This ability is unaffected by Crossfade talents.
7.longDescription: Blast Lúcio's active Crossfade track at enemy Heroes. While Amp It Up is active, Healing Boost deals 50 (+4% per level) damage per second and Speed Boost Slows by 20%.  This ability is unaffected by Crossfade talents.

7.name: Boombox
7.description: Place a boombox that plays Lúcio's active Crossfade track. Its volume adjusts with Amp It Up. Allied Heroes near the boombox gain 5 Armor.  Crossfade tracks from Lúcio and the Boombox do not stack.
7.longDescription: Place a boombox that plays Lúcio's active Crossfade track. Its volume adjusts with Amp It Up. Allied Heroes near the boombox gain 5 Armor.  Crossfade tracks from Lúcio and the Boombox do not stack.

10.name: Sound Barrier
10.description: After 1 second, Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes gain a 1296 (+4% per level) point Shield that rapidly decays over 6 seconds.
10.longDescription: After 1 second, Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes gain a 1296 (+4% per level) point Shield that rapidly decays over 6 seconds.

10.name: High Five
10.description: Quickly skate to an allied Hero. Upon arrival the ally is healed for 230 (+4% per level), Lúcio is healed for 80 (+4% per level), and both gain Unstoppable for 1 second.
10.longDescription: Quickly skate to an allied Hero. Upon arrival the ally is healed for 230 (+4% per level), Lúcio is healed for 80 (+4% per level), and both gain Unstoppable for 1 second.

13.name: All Together
13.description: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains 5% Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.
13.longDescription: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains 5% Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.

13.name: Heavy Casters
13.description: Push Off no longer Slows the first Hero hit, and instead Stuns them for 0.5 seconds.
13.longDescription: Push Off no longer Slows the first Hero hit, and instead Stuns them for 0.5 seconds.

13.name: Slip
13.description: While Wall Ride is active, passing near an enemy Hero increases its Movement Speed bonus to 40%, and grants 15 Armor, for 1 second.
13.longDescription: While Wall Ride is active, passing near an enemy Hero increases its Movement Speed bonus to 40%, and grants 15 Armor, for 1 second.

16.name: Rejuvenescência
16.description: While Amp It Up is active, Crossfade's Healing Boost heals for an additional 2.5% of the target's maximum Health each second.
16.longDescription: While Amp It Up is active, Crossfade's Healing Boost heals for an additional 2.5% of the target's maximum Health each second.

16.name: Up the Frequency
16.description: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Amp It Up by 0.3 seconds.  Passive: Wall Ride increases Basic Attack range by 2.2.
16.longDescription: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Amp It Up by 0.3 seconds.  Passive: Wall Ride increases Basic Attack range by 2.2.

16.name: Up To Eleven
16.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Soundwave or Push Off increases the duration of Amp It Up.  Soundwave grants 0.5 seconds and Push Off grants 1 second. If Amp It Up is not active, these bonuses are granted to its next activation, up to 3 seconds.  Passive: Increase the duration of Amp It Up by 1 second.
16.longDescription: Hitting an enemy Hero with Soundwave or Push Off increases the duration of Amp It Up.  Soundwave grants 0.5 seconds and Push Off grants 1 second. If Amp It Up is not active, these bonuses are granted to its next activation, up to 3 seconds.  Passive: Increase the duration of Amp It Up by 1 second.

20.name: Bossa Nova
20.description: Reduce the cooldown of Sound Barrier to 30 seconds, but the Shield now decays over 4 seconds.
20.longDescription: Reduce the cooldown of Sound Barrier to 30 seconds, but the Shield now decays over 4 seconds.

20.name: Mixing Fire
20.description: High Five can now be cast on enemy Heroes, dealing 160 (+4% per level) damage and reducing all healing received by 50% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the cost and cooldown of High Five by 30%.
20.longDescription: High Five can now be cast on enemy Heroes, dealing 160 (+4% per level) damage and reducing all healing received by 50% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the cost and cooldown of High Five by 30%.

20.name: House Party
20.description: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains 8% increased healing.
20.longDescription: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains 8% increased healing.

20.name: Summer Anthem
20.description: Activate for allies affected by Crossfade to become Unkillable for 1.5 seconds.
20.longDescription: Activate for Lucio and all other allies affected by Crossfade to become Unkillable for 1.5 seconds.
